---
title: "SSC Fertilization Management trials in Turkey - 2025 Season"
author: "Naharajan Lakshmanaperumal, Senior Data Scientist, EMEA Agronomy"
date: "24.02.2026"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
  word_document:
    reference_docx: south_africa_variety_data_report_final.docx
  beamer_presentation: default
  pdf_document: default
  slidy_presentation: default
always_allow_html: yes
---

# Contents

<div class="logos"><img src="/mnt/images/emea_md_logo_3.PNG" width="50px" align="right"></div>
 
<div class="logos"><img src="/mnt/images/RZ_EMEA_Sign_Claim_Screen_RGB_on_white (1) (1).png" width="100px" align="right"></div>


- SSC Fertilization Management Trials

- Data Summary

- Exploratory data analysis - Replicate Clustering based on Plot level observations, Soil characteristics and Drone data

- Statistical data analysis using linear mixed effect models - ANOVA, Oulier detection and marginal means (lsmeans) comparison
  
<div class="logos"><img src="/mnt/images/restricted.PNG" width="100px" align="right"></div>


# SSC Fertilization Management Trials 

- **To understand and characterize the interaction of Fertilization management and plant density on SSC and Tall Corn hybrids in Turkey**  

```{r eval=FALSE}
## HYBRIDS  :  DKC7236SC DKC6980 DKC6648SC DKC5685 
## plant_density    :  95 130 
## TREATMENTS   :  0 150 350 280 
## replicate    :  1 2 3 4 
```


# Data Summary

## Comparison of replicates

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.height=7}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lmerTest)
library(stringr)

turkey_data = read_excel("/mnt/data/N row data.xlsx")
names(turkey_data)[4] = "replicate"

turkey_data = filter(turkey_data, !is.na(replicate))
#turkey_data = filter(turkey_data, HYBRID !="EX7210-95")

turkey_data$`YIELD TON / HA IN 15 MOISTURE` = as.double(turkey_data$`YIELD TON / HA IN 15 MOISTURE`)

turkey_data$dry_yield_t_ha = turkey_data$`YIELD TON / HA IN 15 MOISTURE`


#corrected data from Mustafa

turkey_data = read_excel("/mnt/data/LAST-RAW-Fertilization Trial Harvest Results.xlsx")

turkey_data = read_excel("/mnt/data/LAST-RAW-Fertilization Trial Harvest Results(1).xlsx")



names(turkey_data)[4] = "replicate"

turkey_data = filter(turkey_data, !is.na(replicate))
#turkey_data = filter(turkey_data, HYBRID !="EX7210-95")

turkey_data$`YIELD TON / HA IN 15 MOISTURE` = as.double(turkey_data$`YIELD TON / HA IN 15 MOISTURE`)

turkey_data$dry_yield_t_ha = turkey_data$`YIELD TON / HA IN 15 MOISTURE`


#turkey_data_irr = turkey_data_irr %>% mutate(volumn_water_applied_mm3_ha = ifelse(TREATMENTS=="FLOWERING 75",748,ifelse(TREATMENTS=="TOTAL 75",676,ifelse(TREATMENTS=="STANDART 100",803,ifelse(TREATMENTS=="HIGH 125",1004,NA)))))

#turkey_data = turkey_data %>% mutate(N_uptake_efficiency_t_kg=dry_yield_t_ha/`N DOSE TOTAL` )
turkey_data = turkey_data %>% mutate(N_use_efficiency_kg_t=APPLICATION/dry_yield_t_ha)

#turkey_data = turkey_data %>% mutate(plant_density = ifelse(HYBRID %in% c("EX6658", "EW6846"),"130K","95K"))

turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:39,438,439,165,166,169,287,288,291,371,372,375)]

turkey_data_yield_1 = turkey_data[,c(1:39,54,438,439,165,166,169,287,288,291,371,372,375)]

names(turkey_data_yield_1)[40] = "total_nitrogen_soil_before_planting_g_per_kg"
turkey_data_yield_1$soil_bulk_density_g_per_cm3 = 1.3
turkey_data_yield_1$soil_depth_cm = 30


turkey_data_yield_1 = turkey_data_yield_1 %>% mutate(total_nitrogen_soil_kg_per_ha=total_nitrogen_soil_before_planting_g_per_kg*soil_bulk_density_g_per_cm3*soil_depth_cm*100)

turkey_data_yield_1 = turkey_data_yield_1 %>% mutate(total_nitrogen_kgN_per_ha=total_nitrogen_soil_kg_per_ha+APPLICATION)

turkey_data_yield_1 = turkey_data_yield_1 %>% mutate(NUE_kg_per_kg_totalN=(dry_yield_t_ha*1000)/total_nitrogen_kgN_per_ha)

turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:39,438,439,165,166,169,287,288,291,371,372,375)]

turkey_data_yield = turkey_data_yield_1[,c(1:39,41,42,56,43:51)]


turkey_data_long = turkey_data_yield %>% gather(type,value, 8:51)




turkey_data_long_1 = filter(turkey_data_long, type %in% c("Uniformity","STAY GREEN" ,"APPERIANCE"))

turkey_data_long_1$value = as.double(turkey_data_long_1$value )

ggplot(turkey_data_long_1, aes(as.factor(as.integer(as.character(APPLICATION))),value,fill=as.factor(replicate)))+geom_bar(stat="identity",position="dodge")+facet_grid(HYBRID~type, scales="free")+theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
                                                                                                                                                                                                     axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
                                                                                                                                                                                                     axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )+xlab("Nitrogen dose")+ggtitle("Replicate comparison")



turkey_data_long_1 = filter(turkey_data_long, type %in% c("dry_yield_t_ha" ,"Moisture (LAB)"))

turkey_data_long_1$value = as.double(turkey_data_long_1$value )

ggplot(turkey_data_long_1, aes(as.factor(as.integer(as.character(`APPLICATION`))),value,fill=as.factor(replicate)))+geom_bar(stat="identity",position="dodge")+facet_grid(HYBRID~type, scales="free")+theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
                                                                                                                                                                                                     axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
                                                                                                                                                                                                     axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )+xlab("Nitrogen dose")+ggtitle("Replicate comparison")

turkey_data_long_1 = filter(turkey_data_long, type %in% c("SPAD-55" ,"SPAD-80" ,"EAR HEIGHT"))

turkey_data_long_1$value = as.double(turkey_data_long_1$value )

ggplot(turkey_data_long_1, aes(as.factor(as.integer(as.character(APPLICATION))),value,fill=as.factor(replicate)))+geom_bar(stat="identity",position="dodge")+facet_grid(HYBRID~type, scales="free")+theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
                                                                                                                                                                                                     axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
                                                                                                                                                                                                     axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )+xlab("Nitrogen dose")+ggtitle("Replicate comparison")

turkey_data_long_1 = filter(turkey_data_long, type %in% c( "PLANT HEIGHT" ))

turkey_data_long_1$value = as.double(turkey_data_long_1$value )

ggplot(turkey_data_long_1, aes(as.factor(as.integer(as.character(APPLICATION))),value,fill=as.factor(replicate)))+geom_bar(stat="identity",position="dodge")+facet_grid(HYBRID~type, scales="free")+theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
                                                                                                                                                                                                     axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
                                                                                                                                                                                                     axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )+xlab("Nitrogen dose")+ggtitle("Replicate comparison")

turkey_data_long_1 = filter(turkey_data_long, type %in% c( "NUE_kg_per_kg_totalN" ))

turkey_data_long_1$value = as.double(turkey_data_long_1$value )

ggplot(turkey_data_long_1, aes(as.factor(as.integer(as.character(APPLICATION))),value,fill=as.factor(replicate)))+geom_bar(stat="identity",position="dodge")+facet_grid(HYBRID~type, scales="free")+theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
                                                                                                                                                                                                     axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
                                                                                                                                                                                                     axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )+xlab("Nitrogen dose")+ggtitle("Replicate comparison")

# 
# names(ssc_data)[29] = "A_Photosynthesis"
# names(ssc_data)[28] = "gs_Stomatal_conductance"
# names(ssc_data)[27] = "E_Transpiration"
# names(ssc_data)[26] = "ci_Substomatal_cavity_CO2_conc_umol_per_mol"
# names(ssc_data)[21] = "Tleaf_leaf_surface_temperature"

# names(ssc_data)[4] = "productName"
# 
# 
# ssc_data = ssc_data %>% mutate(hybrid_brand = ifelse(startsWith(productName,"D"),"dekalb","pcm4"),hybrid_name = ifelse(startsWith(productName,"D"),str_sub(productName, 1, 7),str_sub(productName, 1, 6)), relative_maturity=ifelse(hybrid_brand=="dekalb",as.numeric(str_sub(productName, 4, 5))+50,as.numeric(str_sub(productName, 3, 4))+50),maturity_group = ifelse(relative_maturity<88,"early",ifelse(relative_maturity>=102,"late","mid")))
# 
# 
# ssc_hybrids = c("EW6846XKL1" ,"EW6015XKL1","EW6436XKL1","EW6650XKP1","EW6526XKL1","EW6846","EW6436")
#  
# ssc_data = ssc_data %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(hybrid_name %in% ssc_hybrids, "ssc","tall"))
# ssc_data$year = 2023
# ssc_data$country = "greece"
# ssc_data$trial_source = "External"
# names(ssc_data)[1] = "Location"
# names(ssc_data)[5] = "density_seeds_per_ha"
# names(ssc_data)[6] = "interrow_width_cm"
# names(ssc_data)[35] = "hybrid"
# names(ssc_data)[7] = "irrigation"
# 
# ssc_data = ssc_data %>% mutate(irrigation_percent = ifelse(irrigation == 100,100,75))
# 
# ssc_data = ssc_data %>% group_by(Location,irrigation_percent,productName) %>% mutate(Replicate = row_number())
# 
# ssc_data$irrigation = as.factor(ssc_data$irrigation)
# ssc_data$irrigation_percent = as.factor(ssc_data$irrigation_percent)
# ssc_data$hybrid = as.factor(ssc_data$hybrid)
# ssc_data$Replicate = as.factor(ssc_data$Replicate)
# 
# ssc_data$Protocol = "SSC - Water management trials"
# 
# ssc_data_yield = read_excel("/mnt/data/ALL DATA WATER 2023_NAHA.xlsx", sheet = 7)
# 
# names(ssc_data_yield)[5] = "productName"
# 
# ssc_data_yield = ssc_data_yield %>% mutate(hybrid_brand = ifelse(startsWith(productName,"D"),"dekalb","pcm4"),hybrid = ifelse(startsWith(productName,"D"),str_sub(productName, 1, 7),str_sub(productName, 1, 6)), relative_maturity=ifelse(hybrid_brand=="dekalb",as.numeric(str_sub(productName, 4, 5))+50,as.numeric(str_sub(productName, 3, 4))+50),maturity_group = ifelse(relative_maturity<88,"early",ifelse(relative_maturity>=102,"late","mid")))
# 
# ssc_hybrids = c("EW6846XKL1" ,"EW6015XKL1","EW6436XKL1","EW6650XKP1","EW6526XKL1","EW6846","EW6436")

# ssc_data_yield = ssc_data_yield %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(hybrid %in% ssc_hybrids, "ssc","tall"))

# ssc_data_yield$trial_source = "External"

# names(ssc_data_yield)[2] = "density_seeds_per_ha"

#

#

# ssc_data_yield$hybrid = as.factor(ssc_data_yield$hybrid)

# ssc_water_past$Replicate = as.factor(ssc_water_past$Replicate)
# 
# ssc_water_past = ssc_water_past %>% mutate(hybrid_brand = ifelse(startsWith(hybrid,"D"),"dekalb","pcm4"),hybrid = ifelse(startsWith(hybrid,"D"),str_sub(hybrid, 1, 7),str_sub(hybrid, 1, 6)), relative_maturity=ifelse(hybrid_brand=="dekalb",as.numeric(str_sub(hybrid, 4, 5))+50,as.numeric(str_sub(hybrid, 3, 4))+50),maturity_group = ifelse(relative_maturity<88,"early",ifelse(relative_maturity>=102,"late","mid")))
# 
# ssc_hybrids = c("EW6846XKL1" ,"EW6015XKL1","EW6436XKL1","EW6650XKP1","EW6526XKL1","EW6846","EW6436")
#  
# ssc_water_past = ssc_water_past %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(hybrid %in% ssc_hybrids, "ssc","tall"))
# 
# ssc_data$gs_Stomatal_conductance = as.character(ssc_data$gs_Stomatal_conductance)
# ssc_data$A_Photosynthesis = as.character(ssc_data$A_Photosynthesis)
# 
# ssc_data_all = bind_rows(ssc_water_past,ssc_data_yield,ssc_data)
# 
# ssc_data_all = ssc_data_all %>% mutate(hybrid_name = ifelse(hybrid =="EW6436", "EW6436XKL1",ifelse(hybrid =="EW6846", "EW6846XKL1",ifelse(hybrid =="EW6015", "EW6015XKL1",hybrid))))
# 
# # ssc_data = ssc_data %>% mutate(hybrid = ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("DKC 6402"),"DKC6402", ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("DKC 6980"),"DKC6980", ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("SSC1 40 Cm","SSC1 80 Cm"),"EW6436", ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("SSC2 40Cm","SSC2 80 Cm"),"EW6846", ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("SSC3 40 Cm","SSC3 80 Cm"),"EW6015","NA"))))))
# # 
# # ssc_data = ssc_data %>% mutate(interrow_width = ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("DKC 6402"),80, ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("DKC 6980"),80, ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("SSC2 80 Cm","SSC1 80 Cm","SSC3 80 Cm"),80, ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("SSC1 40 Cm","SSC2 40Cm","SSC3 40 Cm"),40,"NA")))))
# # 
# # ssc_data = ssc_data %>% mutate(interrow_width_cm = ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("DKC 6402"),"80 cm", ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("DKC 6980"),"80 cm", ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("SSC2 80 Cm","SSC1 80 Cm","SSC3 80 Cm"),"80 cm", ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("SSC1 40 Cm","SSC2 40Cm","SSC3 40 Cm"),"40 cm","NA")))))
# # 
# # ssc_data = ssc_data %>% mutate(hybrid_name = ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("DKC 6402"),"DKC6402", ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("DKC 6980"),"DKC6980", ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("SSC1 40 Cm","SSC1 80 Cm"),"EW6436", ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("SSC2 40Cm","SSC2 80 Cm"),"EW6846", ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("SSC3 40 Cm","SSC3 80 Cm"),"EW6015","NA"))))))
# 
# 
# ssc_data_all = ssc_data_all %>% unite(hybrid_interrow_width_cm,hybrid_name,interrow_width_cm, sep="_", remove=F )
# #Target_density	Nitrogen	Interrow	number_points	mean_dry_yield	mean_moisture_percent	Trial	country	sub_country	year
#

# # ssc_data_write$Protocol = "SSC - Water management trials"
# # ssc_data_write$year = 2022
# # ssc_data_write$Hybrids = NULL
# # ssc_data_write$hybrid_interrow_width_cm = NULL
# # ssc_data_write$Comments = NULL
# # ssc_data_write$interrow_width_cm = NULL 
# # names(ssc_data_write)[8] = "interrow_width_cm"
# # ssc_data_write$hybrid_name = NULL
# # 
# # ssc_data_write = ssc_data_write %>% mutate(Replicate = ifelse(Rep == "Rep.1",1,ifelse(Rep == "Rep.2",2, ifelse(Rep=="Rep.3",3,4))))
# # 
# # ssc_data_write$Rep=NULL
# # 
# # ssc_data_write$Irrigation = as.double(as.character(ssc_data_write$Irrigation))
# # 
# # ssc_data_write$Irrigation = ssc_data_write$Irrigation*100
# # names(ssc_data_write)[2] = "irrigation_percent"

# # ssc_data_write$Trial = ssc_data_write$Location 
# # ssc_data_write$trial_source = "External"
# #

# #

# # 
# # ssc_data_write = ssc_data_write %>% mutate(hybrid_name = ifelse(hybrid =="EW6436", "EW6436XKL1",ifelse(hybrid =="EW6846", "EW6846XKL1",ifelse(hybrid =="EW6015", "EW6015XKL1",hybrid))))
# #

# # names(ssc_data_write)[15] = "hybrid"

# # 
# # ssc_data_write = ssc_data_write %>% mutate(longitude = ifelse(Location =="Majarromaque", -5.900635,ifelse(Location =="Aguas Nuevas", -1.930363,ifelse(Location =="Almansa", -1.119966,-5.980877))))
# # 
# # #ssc_data_write = ssc_data_write[,c(7,8,10,11,1,12,15,13,14,2,6,9,4,3,5)]
# 
# readr::write_csv(ssc_data_all,"/mnt/data/EMEA_SSC_Water_management_trials_data_updated.csv")


```

# Replicate Clustering 


## Clustering based on all plot level observations

```{r, echo=F}

turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:28,438)]
turkey_data_yield$`HARVESTED ROW NUMBER` = NULL
turkey_data_yield$`ROW DISTANCE`  = NULL
turkey_data_yield$`H Row Width`  = NULL
turkey_data_yield$`H Row Length`  = NULL
#turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:7,8:32)]

turkey_data_yield$`The number of rows` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`The number of rows`)

rep_trt_1 = turkey_data_yield %>% group_by(replicate) %>% summarise(moisture_combine = mean(`MOISTURE (COMBINE)`, na.rm=T),shell_weight = mean(`SHELL WEIGHT`, na.rm=T),ear_height = mean(`EAR HEIGHT`, na.rm=T),plant_height = mean(`PLANT HEIGHT`, na.rm=T),flowering = mean(FLOWERING, na.rm=T),Uniformity = mean(Uniformity, na.rm=T),plant_index = mean(`PLANT INDEX`, na.rm=T),plant_appearance = mean(`PLANT APPEARANCE`, na.rm=T),spad_55= mean(`SPAD-55`, na.rm=T),spad_80= mean(`SPAD-80`, na.rm=T),diameter= mean(DIAMETER, na.rm=T),plant_count= mean(`PLANT COUNT`, na.rm=T),number_of_ear_rows= mean(`The number of rows`, na.rm=T),number_of_kernels_per_row= mean(`The number of kernels per row` , na.rm=T),ear_weight= mean( `EAR WEIGHT` , na.rm=T),test_weight_combine= mean( `TEST WEIGHT (COMBINE)` , na.rm=T),moisture_lab= mean(  `Moisture (LAB)` , na.rm=T),dry_yield_t_ha= mean(  dry_yield_t_ha , na.rm=T), .groups ="drop") #%>% unite(trt,HYBRID, DENSITY,APPLICATION ) #%>% pivot_wider(names_from=trt, values_from=Total_Nitrogen)

rep_trt_1  = rep_trt_1 %>% mutate(rep = paste("Rep_",replicate, sep=""))
rep_trt_1$replicate = NULL

#lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1 = lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test %>% spread(trait_code,final_rank)



rep_mat = as.matrix(rep_trt_1[,-19])
#rep_mat$trt = NULL
rep_mat_scaled = scale(rep_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(rep_mat_scaled), method="ward.D2")
plot(hc, main="replicate clustering")
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}

row.names(rep_trt_1) = rep_trt_1$rep

rep_trt_1_obs = rep_trt_1

rep_trt_2 = rep_trt_1

rep_trt_2 <- rep_trt_2[,-19]

#pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = FALSE,show_rownames=TRUE, color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50))
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_2)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = TRUE,show_colnames=TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50))
```

### Hybrid

```{r, echo=F}

turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:28,438)]
turkey_data_yield$`HARVESTED ROW NUMBER` = NULL
turkey_data_yield$`ROW DISTANCE`  = NULL
turkey_data_yield$`H Row Width`  = NULL
turkey_data_yield$`H Row Length`  = NULL
#turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:7,8:32)]

turkey_data_yield$`The number of rows` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`The number of rows`)

rep_trt_1 = turkey_data_yield %>% group_by(HYBRID) %>% summarise(moisture_combine = mean(`MOISTURE (COMBINE)`, na.rm=T),shell_weight = mean(`SHELL WEIGHT`, na.rm=T),ear_height = mean(`EAR HEIGHT`, na.rm=T),plant_height = mean(`PLANT HEIGHT`, na.rm=T),flowering = mean(FLOWERING, na.rm=T),Uniformity = mean(Uniformity, na.rm=T),plant_index = mean(`PLANT INDEX`, na.rm=T),plant_appearance = mean(`PLANT APPEARANCE`, na.rm=T),spad_55= mean(`SPAD-55`, na.rm=T),spad_80= mean(`SPAD-80`, na.rm=T),diameter= mean(DIAMETER, na.rm=T),plant_count= mean(`PLANT COUNT`, na.rm=T),number_of_ear_rows= mean(`The number of rows`, na.rm=T),number_of_kernels_per_row= mean(`The number of kernels per row` , na.rm=T),ear_weight= mean( `EAR WEIGHT` , na.rm=T),test_weight_combine= mean( `TEST WEIGHT (COMBINE)` , na.rm=T),moisture_lab= mean(  `Moisture (LAB)` , na.rm=T),dry_yield_t_ha= mean(  dry_yield_t_ha , na.rm=T), .groups ="drop") #%>% unite(trt,HYBRID, DENSITY,APPLICATION ) #%>% pivot_wider(names_from=trt, values_from=Total_Nitrogen)

#rep_trt_1  = rep_trt_1 %>% mutate(rep = paste("Rep_",replicate, sep=""))
#rep_trt_1$replicate = NULL

#lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1 = lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test %>% spread(trait_code,final_rank)
rep_trt_1 = as.data.frame(rep_trt_1)
rownames(rep_trt_1) = rep_trt_1[,1]
rep_trt_1 <- rep_trt_1[,-1]

#autoscoring <- dist(lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1) # method="man" # is a bit better
#cluster <- hclust(autoscoring, method = "complete")
#plot(cluster)


rep_mat = as.matrix(rep_trt_1)
#rep_mat$trt = NULL
rep_mat_scaled = scale(rep_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(rep_mat_scaled), method="ward.D2")
plot(hc, main="replicate clustering")
```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = TRUE,show_colnames=TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50))
```


## Clustering based on soil characteristics at planting

```{r, echo=F}



turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:7,47,50,54,58,62,66,70,74)]

turkey_data_yield$`pH (KCl)...47` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`pH (KCl)...47`)
turkey_data_yield$`Organic matter...50` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Organic matter...50`)
turkey_data_yield$`Total Nitrogen...54` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Total Nitrogen...54`)
turkey_data_yield$`Phosphorus (M3)...58` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Phosphorus (M3)...58`)
turkey_data_yield$`Potassium (exch.)...62` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Potassium (exch.)...62`)
turkey_data_yield$`Cation Exchange Capacity` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Cation Exchange Capacity`)
turkey_data_yield$`Clay...70` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Clay...70`)
turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture...74` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture...74`)


rep_trt_1 = turkey_data_yield %>% group_by(replicate) %>% summarise(pH = mean(`pH (KCl)...47`, na.rm=T),OM = mean(`Organic matter...50`, na.rm=T),Total_Nitrogen = mean(`Total Nitrogen...54`, na.rm=T),Phosphorus = mean(`Phosphorus (M3)...58`, na.rm=T),Potassium = mean(`Potassium (exch.)...62`, na.rm=T),CEC = mean(`Cation Exchange Capacity`, na.rm=T),Clay = mean(`Clay...70`, na.rm=T),soil_moisture = mean(`Soil Moisture...74`, na.rm=T), .groups ="drop") #%>% unite(trt,HYBRID, DENSITY,APPLICATION ) #%>% pivot_wider(names_from=trt, values_from=Total_Nitrogen)

rep_trt_1  = rep_trt_1 %>% mutate(rep = paste("Rep_",replicate, sep=""))
rep_trt_1$replicate = NULL


rep_trt_1_soil=rep_trt_1


#lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1 = lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test %>% spread(trait_code,final_rank)



rep_mat = as.matrix(rep_trt_1[,-9])
#rep_mat$trt = NULL
rep_mat_scaled = scale(rep_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(rep_mat_scaled), method="ward.D2")
plot(hc, main="replicate clustering")
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}

row.names(rep_trt_1) = rep_trt_1$rep

rep_trt_1 <- rep_trt_1[,-9]

#pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(rep_trt_1),  scale="column",cluster_cols = FALSE,show_rownames=TRUE, color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50))
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50))
```

### Hybrid

```{r, echo=F}



turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:7,47,50,54,58,62,66,70,74)]

turkey_data_yield$`pH (KCl)...47` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`pH (KCl)...47`)
turkey_data_yield$`Organic matter...50` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Organic matter...50`)
turkey_data_yield$`Total Nitrogen...54` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Total Nitrogen...54`)
turkey_data_yield$`Phosphorus (M3)...58` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Phosphorus (M3)...58`)
turkey_data_yield$`Potassium (exch.)...62` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Potassium (exch.)...62`)
turkey_data_yield$`Cation Exchange Capacity` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Cation Exchange Capacity`)
turkey_data_yield$`Clay...70` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Clay...70`)
turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture...74` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture...74`)


rep_trt_1 = turkey_data_yield %>% group_by(HYBRID) %>% summarise(pH_planting = mean(`pH (KCl)...47`, na.rm=T),OM_planting = mean(`Organic matter...50`, na.rm=T),Total_Nitrogen_planting = mean(`Total Nitrogen...54`, na.rm=T),Phosphorus_planting = mean(`Phosphorus (M3)...58`, na.rm=T),Potassium_planting = mean(`Potassium (exch.)...62`, na.rm=T),CEC_planting = mean(`Cation Exchange Capacity`, na.rm=T),Clay_planting = mean(`Clay...70`, na.rm=T),soil_moisture_planting = mean(`Soil Moisture...74`, na.rm=T), .groups ="drop") #%>% unite(trt,HYBRID, DENSITY,APPLICATION ) #%>% pivot_wider(names_from=trt, values_from=Total_Nitrogen)
rep_trt_1_planting = rep_trt_1


rep_trt_1_planting_density = turkey_data_yield %>% group_by(HYBRID,DENSITY) %>% summarise(pH_planting = mean(`pH (KCl)...47`, na.rm=T),OM_planting = mean(`Organic matter...50`, na.rm=T),Total_Nitrogen_planting = mean(`Total Nitrogen...54`, na.rm=T),Phosphorus_planting = mean(`Phosphorus (M3)...58`, na.rm=T),Potassium_planting = mean(`Potassium (exch.)...62`, na.rm=T),CEC_planting = mean(`Cation Exchange Capacity`, na.rm=T),Clay_planting = mean(`Clay...70`, na.rm=T),soil_moisture_planting = mean(`Soil Moisture...74`, na.rm=T), .groups ="drop") #%>% unite(trt,HYBRID, DENSITY,APPLICATION ) #%>% pivot_wider(names_from=trt, values_from=Total_Nitrogen)
rep_trt_1_planting_density = rep_trt_1_planting_density %>% unite(hybrid_density, HYBRID,DENSITY, sep="_",remove=T)
#rep_trt_1_planting_density = rep_trt_1_density

rep_trt_1_planting_density_nitrogen = turkey_data_yield %>% group_by(HYBRID,DENSITY,APPLICATION) %>% summarise(pH_planting = mean(`pH (KCl)...47`, na.rm=T),OM_planting = mean(`Organic matter...50`, na.rm=T),Total_Nitrogen_planting = mean(`Total Nitrogen...54`, na.rm=T),Phosphorus_planting = mean(`Phosphorus (M3)...58`, na.rm=T),Potassium_planting = mean(`Potassium (exch.)...62`, na.rm=T),CEC_planting = mean(`Cation Exchange Capacity`, na.rm=T),Clay_planting = mean(`Clay...70`, na.rm=T),soil_moisture_planting = mean(`Soil Moisture...74`, na.rm=T), .groups ="drop") #%>% unite(trt,HYBRID, DENSITY,APPLICATION ) #%>% pivot_wider(names_from=trt, values_from=Total_Nitrogen)
rep_trt_1_planting_density_nitrogen = rep_trt_1_planting_density_nitrogen %>% unite(hybrid_density_application, HYBRID,DENSITY,APPLICATION, sep="_",remove=T)

#rep_trt_1_planting_density_application = rep_trt_1_density_application


rep_trt_1 = as.data.frame(rep_trt_1)
rownames(rep_trt_1) = rep_trt_1[,1]
rep_trt_1 <- rep_trt_1[,-1]

#autoscoring <- dist(lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1) # method="man" # is a bit better
#cluster <- hclust(autoscoring, method = "complete")
#plot(cluster)


rep_mat = as.matrix(rep_trt_1)
#rep_mat$trt = NULL
rep_mat_scaled = scale(rep_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(rep_mat_scaled), method="ward.D2")
plot(hc, main="replicate clustering")
```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = TRUE,show_colnames=TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50))
```


## Clustering based on soil characteristics after application

```{r, echo=F}



turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:7,80,84,88,92,96,100,104,108)]

turkey_data_yield$`pH (KCl)...80` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`pH (KCl)...80`)
turkey_data_yield$`Organic matter...84` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Organic matter...84`)
turkey_data_yield$`Total Nitrogen...88` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Total Nitrogen...88`)
turkey_data_yield$`Phosphorus (M3)...92` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Phosphorus (M3)...92`)
turkey_data_yield$`Potassium (exch.)...96` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Potassium (exch.)...96`)
turkey_data_yield$`Effective CEC...100` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Effective CEC...100`)
turkey_data_yield$`Clay...104` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Clay...104`)
turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture...108` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture...108`)


rep_trt_1 = turkey_data_yield %>% group_by(replicate) %>% summarise(pH = mean(`pH (KCl)...80`, na.rm=T),OM = mean(`Organic matter...84`, na.rm=T),Total_Nitrogen = mean(`Total Nitrogen...88`, na.rm=T),Phosphorus = mean(`Phosphorus (M3)...92`, na.rm=T),Potassium = mean(`Potassium (exch.)...96`, na.rm=T),CEC = mean(`Effective CEC...100`, na.rm=T),Clay = mean(`Clay...104`, na.rm=T),soil_moisture = mean(`Soil Moisture...108`, na.rm=T), .groups ="drop") #%>% unite(trt,HYBRID, DENSITY,APPLICATION ) #%>% pivot_wider(names_from=trt, values_from=Total_Nitrogen)

rep_trt_1  = rep_trt_1 %>% mutate(rep = paste("Rep_",replicate, sep=""))
rep_trt_1$replicate = NULL


rep_trt_1_soil_application=rep_trt_1


#lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1 = lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test %>% spread(trait_code,final_rank)



rep_mat = as.matrix(rep_trt_1[,-9])
#rep_mat$trt = NULL
rep_mat_scaled = scale(rep_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(rep_mat_scaled), method="ward.D2")
plot(hc, main="replicate clustering")
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}

row.names(rep_trt_1) = rep_trt_1$rep

rep_trt_1 <- rep_trt_1[,-9]


#pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(rep_trt_1),  scale="column",cluster_cols = FALSE,show_rownames=TRUE, color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50))
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50))
```

### Hybrids

```{r, echo=F}



turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:7,80,84,88,92,96,100,104,108)]

turkey_data_yield$`pH (KCl)...80` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`pH (KCl)...80`)
turkey_data_yield$`Organic matter...84` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Organic matter...84`)
turkey_data_yield$`Total Nitrogen...88` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Total Nitrogen...88`)
turkey_data_yield$`Phosphorus (M3)...92` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Phosphorus (M3)...92`)
turkey_data_yield$`Potassium (exch.)...96` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Potassium (exch.)...96`)
turkey_data_yield$`Effective CEC...100` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Effective CEC...100`)
turkey_data_yield$`Clay...104` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Clay...104`)
turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture...108` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture...108`)


rep_trt_1 = turkey_data_yield %>% group_by(HYBRID) %>% summarise(pH_application= mean(`pH (KCl)...80`, na.rm=T),OM_application = mean(`Organic matter...84`, na.rm=T),Total_Nitrogen_application = mean(`Total Nitrogen...88`, na.rm=T),Phosphorus_application = mean(`Phosphorus (M3)...92`, na.rm=T),Potassium_application = mean(`Potassium (exch.)...96`, na.rm=T),CEC_application = mean(`Effective CEC...100`, na.rm=T),Clay_application = mean(`Clay...104`, na.rm=T),soil_moisture_application = mean(`Soil Moisture...108`, na.rm=T), .groups ="drop") #%>% unite(trt,HYBRID, DENSITY,APPLICATION ) #%>% pivot_wider(names_from=trt, values_from=Total_Nitrogen)

rep_trt_1_application = rep_trt_1


rep_trt_1_application_density = turkey_data_yield %>% group_by(HYBRID,DENSITY) %>% summarise(pH_application= mean(`pH (KCl)...80`, na.rm=T),OM_application = mean(`Organic matter...84`, na.rm=T),Total_Nitrogen_application = mean(`Total Nitrogen...88`, na.rm=T),Phosphorus_application = mean(`Phosphorus (M3)...92`, na.rm=T),Potassium_application = mean(`Potassium (exch.)...96`, na.rm=T),CEC_application = mean(`Effective CEC...100`, na.rm=T),Clay_application = mean(`Clay...104`, na.rm=T),soil_moisture_application = mean(`Soil Moisture...108`, na.rm=T), .groups ="drop") #%>% unite(trt,HYBRID, DENSITY,APPLICATION ) #%>% pivot_wider(names_from=trt, values_from=Total_Nitrogen)
rep_trt_1_application_density = rep_trt_1_application_density %>% unite(hybrid_density_application, HYBRID,DENSITY, sep="_",remove=T)

rep_trt_1_application_density_nitrogen = turkey_data_yield %>% group_by(HYBRID,DENSITY,APPLICATION) %>% summarise(pH_application= mean(`pH (KCl)...80`, na.rm=T),OM_application = mean(`Organic matter...84`, na.rm=T),Total_Nitrogen_application = mean(`Total Nitrogen...88`, na.rm=T),Phosphorus_application = mean(`Phosphorus (M3)...92`, na.rm=T),Potassium_application = mean(`Potassium (exch.)...96`, na.rm=T),CEC_application = mean(`Effective CEC...100`, na.rm=T),Clay_application = mean(`Clay...104`, na.rm=T),soil_moisture_application = mean(`Soil Moisture...108`, na.rm=T), .groups ="drop") #%>% unite(trt,HYBRID, DENSITY,APPLICATION ) #%>% pivot_wider(names_from=trt, values_from=Total_Nitrogen)
rep_trt_1_application_density_nitrogen = rep_trt_1_application_density_nitrogen %>% unite(hybrid_density_application, HYBRID,DENSITY,APPLICATION, sep="_",remove=T)

rep_trt_1 = as.data.frame(rep_trt_1)
rownames(rep_trt_1) = rep_trt_1[,1]
rep_trt_1 <- rep_trt_1[,-1]

#autoscoring <- dist(lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1) # method="man" # is a bit better
#cluster <- hclust(autoscoring, method = "complete")
#plot(cluster)


rep_mat = as.matrix(rep_trt_1)
#rep_mat$trt = NULL
rep_mat_scaled = scale(rep_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(rep_mat_scaled), method="ward.D2")
plot(hc, main="replicate clustering")
```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = TRUE,show_colnames=TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50))
```

## Clustering based on soil characteristics after harvest

```{r, echo=F}



turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:7,111,115,119,123,127,131,135,139)]

turkey_data_yield$`pH (KCl)...111` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`pH (KCl)...111`)
turkey_data_yield$`Organic matter...115` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Organic matter...115`)
turkey_data_yield$`Total Nitrogen...119` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Total Nitrogen...119`)
turkey_data_yield$`Phosphorus (M3)...123` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Phosphorus (M3)...123`)
turkey_data_yield$`Potassium (exch.)...127` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Potassium (exch.)...127`)
turkey_data_yield$`Effective CEC...131` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Effective CEC...131`)
turkey_data_yield$`Clay...135` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Clay...135`)
turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture...139` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture...139`)


rep_trt_1 = turkey_data_yield %>% group_by(replicate) %>% summarise(pH = mean(`pH (KCl)...111`, na.rm=T),OM = mean(`Organic matter...115`, na.rm=T),Total_Nitrogen = mean(`Total Nitrogen...119`, na.rm=T),Phosphorus = mean(`Phosphorus (M3)...123`, na.rm=T),Potassium = mean(`Potassium (exch.)...127`, na.rm=T),CEC = mean(`Effective CEC...131`, na.rm=T),Clay = mean(`Clay...135`, na.rm=T),soil_moisture = mean(`Soil Moisture...139`, na.rm=T), .groups ="drop") #%>% unite(trt,HYBRID, DENSITY,APPLICATION ) #%>% pivot_wider(names_from=trt, values_from=Total_Nitrogen)

rep_trt_1  = rep_trt_1 %>% mutate(rep = paste("Rep_",replicate, sep=""))
rep_trt_1$replicate = NULL


rep_trt_1_soil_harvest=rep_trt_1


#lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1 = lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test %>% spread(trait_code,final_rank)



rep_mat = as.matrix(rep_trt_1[,-9])
#rep_mat$trt = NULL
rep_mat_scaled = scale(rep_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(rep_mat_scaled), method="ward.D2")
plot(hc, main="replicate clustering")
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}

row.names(rep_trt_1) = rep_trt_1$rep

rep_trt_1 <- rep_trt_1[,-9]


#pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(rep_trt_1),  scale="column",cluster_cols = FALSE,show_rownames=TRUE, color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50))
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50))
```

### Hybrids

```{r, echo=F}



turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:7,111,115,119,123,127,131,135,139)]

turkey_data_yield$`pH (KCl)...111` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`pH (KCl)...111`)
turkey_data_yield$`Organic matter...115` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Organic matter...115`)
turkey_data_yield$`Total Nitrogen...119` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Total Nitrogen...119`)
turkey_data_yield$`Phosphorus (M3)...123` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Phosphorus (M3)...123`)
turkey_data_yield$`Potassium (exch.)...127` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Potassium (exch.)...127`)
turkey_data_yield$`Effective CEC...131` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Effective CEC...131`)
turkey_data_yield$`Clay...135` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Clay...135`)
turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture...139` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture...139`)


rep_trt_1 = turkey_data_yield %>% group_by(HYBRID) %>% summarise(pH_harvest = mean(`pH (KCl)...111`, na.rm=T),OM_harvest = mean(`Organic matter...115`, na.rm=T),Total_Nitrogen_harvest = mean(`Total Nitrogen...119`, na.rm=T),Phosphorus_harvest = mean(`Phosphorus (M3)...123`, na.rm=T),Potassium_harvest = mean(`Potassium (exch.)...127`, na.rm=T),CEC_harvest = mean(`Effective CEC...131`, na.rm=T),Clay_harvest = mean(`Clay...135`, na.rm=T),soil_moisture_harvest = mean(`Soil Moisture...139`, na.rm=T), .groups ="drop") #%>% unite(trt,HYBRID, DENSITY,APPLICATION ) #%>% pivot_wider(names_from=trt, values_from=Total_Nitrogen)

rep_trt_1_harvest_density = turkey_data_yield %>% group_by(HYBRID,DENSITY) %>% summarise(pH_harvest = mean(`pH (KCl)...111`, na.rm=T),OM_harvest = mean(`Organic matter...115`, na.rm=T),Total_Nitrogen_harvest = mean(`Total Nitrogen...119`, na.rm=T),Phosphorus_harvest = mean(`Phosphorus (M3)...123`, na.rm=T),Potassium_harvest = mean(`Potassium (exch.)...127`, na.rm=T),CEC_harvest = mean(`Effective CEC...131`, na.rm=T),Clay_harvest = mean(`Clay...135`, na.rm=T),soil_moisture_harvest = mean(`Soil Moisture...139`, na.rm=T), .groups ="drop")
rep_trt_1_harvest_density = rep_trt_1_harvest_density %>% unite(hybrid_density, HYBRID,DENSITY, sep="_",remove=T)

rep_trt_1_harvest_density_nitrogen = turkey_data_yield %>% group_by(HYBRID,DENSITY,APPLICATION) %>% summarise(pH_harvest = mean(`pH (KCl)...111`, na.rm=T),OM_harvest = mean(`Organic matter...115`, na.rm=T),Total_Nitrogen_harvest = mean(`Total Nitrogen...119`, na.rm=T),Phosphorus_harvest = mean(`Phosphorus (M3)...123`, na.rm=T),Potassium_harvest = mean(`Potassium (exch.)...127`, na.rm=T),CEC_harvest = mean(`Effective CEC...131`, na.rm=T),Clay_harvest = mean(`Clay...135`, na.rm=T),soil_moisture_harvest = mean(`Soil Moisture...139`, na.rm=T), .groups ="drop")
rep_trt_1_harvest_density_nitrogen = rep_trt_1_harvest_density_nitrogen %>% unite(hybrid_density, HYBRID,DENSITY,APPLICATION, sep="_",remove=T)

rep_trt_1_harvest = rep_trt_1

rep_trt_1 = as.data.frame(rep_trt_1)
rownames(rep_trt_1) = rep_trt_1[,1]
rep_trt_1 <- rep_trt_1[,-1]

#autoscoring <- dist(lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1) # method="man" # is a bit better
#cluster <- hclust(autoscoring, method = "complete")
#plot(cluster)


rep_mat = as.matrix(rep_trt_1)
#rep_mat$trt = NULL
rep_mat_scaled = scale(rep_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(rep_mat_scaled), method="ward.D2")
plot(hc, main="replicate clustering")
```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = TRUE,show_colnames=TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50))
```


# Soil delta analysis - Correlation to Hybrid and Hybrid:Density

```{r echo=F}
rep_trt_1_hybrids = bind_cols(rep_trt_1_planting,rep_trt_1_application, rep_trt_1_harvest)

rep_trt_1_hybrids$hybrid = rep_trt_1_hybrids$HYBRID...1
rep_trt_1_hybrids$HYBRID...1 = NULL
rep_trt_1_hybrids$HYBRID...10 = NULL

rep_trt_1_hybrids$HYBRID...19 = NULL


rep_trt_1_hybrids = rep_trt_1_hybrids %>% group_by(hybrid) %>% mutate(pH_delta_PA = pH_planting-pH_application,pH_delta_PH = pH_planting-pH_harvest,pH_delta_AH = pH_application-pH_harvest,Total_Nitrogen_delta_PA = Total_Nitrogen_planting-Total_Nitrogen_application,Total_Nitrogen_delta_PH = Total_Nitrogen_planting-Total_Nitrogen_harvest,Total_Nitrogen_delta_AH = Total_Nitrogen_application-Total_Nitrogen_harvest
                                                                      ,Potassium_delta_PA = Potassium_planting-Potassium_application,Potassium_delta_PH = Potassium_planting-Potassium_harvest,Potassium_delta_AH = Potassium_application-Potassium_harvest
                                                                      
                                                                      
                                                                      ,Phosphorus_delta_PA = Phosphorus_planting-Phosphorus_application,Phosphorus_delta_PH = Phosphorus_planting-Phosphorus_harvest,Phosphorus_delta_AH = Phosphorus_application-Phosphorus_harvest
                                                                      
                                                                      
                                                                      ,OM_delta_PA = OM_planting-OM_application,OM_delta_PH = OM_planting-OM_harvest,OM_delta_AH = OM_application-OM_harvest
                                                                      
                                                                      
                                                                      ,CEC_delta_PA = CEC_planting-CEC_application,CEC_delta_PH = CEC_planting-CEC_harvest,CEC_delta_AH = CEC_application-CEC_harvest
                                                                      
                                                                      
                                                                      ,Clay_delta_PA = Clay_planting-Clay_application,Clay_delta_PH = Clay_planting-Clay_harvest,Clay_delta_AH = Clay_application-Clay_harvest
                                                                      
                                                                      
                                                                      ,soil_moisture_delta_PA = soil_moisture_planting-soil_moisture_application,soil_moisture_delta_PH = soil_moisture_planting-soil_moisture_harvest,soil_moisture_delta_AH = soil_moisture_application-soil_moisture_harvest,z_score_PH = scale(Total_Nitrogen_delta_PH))


rep_trt_1_hybrids_check = rep_trt_1_hybrids %>% dplyr::select(hybrid,Total_Nitrogen_planting,Total_Nitrogen_application,Total_Nitrogen_delta_PA)

rep_trt_1_hybrids_check$z_score_PA = scale(rep_trt_1_hybrids_check$Total_Nitrogen_delta_PA)

DT::datatable(rep_trt_1_hybrids_check, filter="top")


rep_trt_1_hybrids_check_1 = rep_trt_1_hybrids %>% dplyr::select(hybrid,Total_Nitrogen_application,Total_Nitrogen_harvest,Total_Nitrogen_delta_AH)

rep_trt_1_hybrids_check_1$z_score_AH = scale(rep_trt_1_hybrids_check_1$Total_Nitrogen_delta_AH)

DT::datatable(rep_trt_1_hybrids_check_1, filter="top")


#rep_trt_1_hybrids_check <- rep_trt_1_hybrids_check  %>% 
  #mutate(z_score_PH = scale(Total_Nitrogen_delta_PH))
```


```{r echo=F}
rep_trt_1_hybrids_density = bind_cols(rep_trt_1_planting_density,rep_trt_1_application_density, rep_trt_1_harvest_density)

rep_trt_1_hybrids_density$hybrid_density = rep_trt_1_hybrids_density$hybrid_density...1
rep_trt_1_hybrids_density$hybrid_density...1 = NULL
rep_trt_1_hybrids_density$hybrid_density_application = NULL

rep_trt_1_hybrids_density$hybrid_density...19 = NULL


rep_trt_1_hybrids_density = rep_trt_1_hybrids_density %>% group_by(hybrid_density) %>% mutate(pH_delta_PA = pH_planting-pH_application,pH_delta_PH = pH_planting-pH_harvest,pH_delta_AH = pH_application-pH_harvest,Total_Nitrogen_delta_PA = Total_Nitrogen_planting-Total_Nitrogen_application,Total_Nitrogen_delta_PH = Total_Nitrogen_planting-Total_Nitrogen_harvest,Total_Nitrogen_delta_AH = Total_Nitrogen_application-Total_Nitrogen_harvest
                                                                      ,Potassium_delta_PA = Potassium_planting-Potassium_application,Potassium_delta_PH = Potassium_planting-Potassium_harvest,Potassium_delta_AH = Potassium_application-Potassium_harvest
                                                                      
                                                                      
                                                                      ,Phosphorus_delta_PA = Phosphorus_planting-Phosphorus_application,Phosphorus_delta_PH = Phosphorus_planting-Phosphorus_harvest,Phosphorus_delta_AH = Phosphorus_application-Phosphorus_harvest
                                                                      
                                                                      
                                                                      ,OM_delta_PA = OM_planting-OM_application,OM_delta_PH = OM_planting-OM_harvest,OM_delta_AH = OM_application-OM_harvest
                                                                      
                                                                      
                                                                      ,CEC_delta_PA = CEC_planting-CEC_application,CEC_delta_PH = CEC_planting-CEC_harvest,CEC_delta_AH = CEC_application-CEC_harvest
                                                                      
                                                                      
                                                                      ,Clay_delta_PA = Clay_planting-Clay_application,Clay_delta_PH = Clay_planting-Clay_harvest,Clay_delta_AH = Clay_application-Clay_harvest
                                                                      
                                                                      
                                                                      ,soil_moisture_delta_PA = soil_moisture_planting-soil_moisture_application,soil_moisture_delta_PH = soil_moisture_planting-soil_moisture_harvest,soil_moisture_delta_AH = soil_moisture_application-soil_moisture_harvest)



```

### Delta (Planting - Harvest)

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
rep_trt_1_hybrids_heatmap = rep_trt_1_hybrids[,c(25:49)]

rep_trt_1_hybrids_heatmap_PH = rep_trt_1_hybrids %>% dplyr::select(pH_delta_PH,Total_Nitrogen_delta_PH,Potassium_delta_PH,Phosphorus_delta_PH,OM_delta_PH,CEC_delta_PH,Clay_delta_PH,soil_moisture_delta_PH)
rep_trt_1_hybrids_heatmap_PH = as.data.frame(rep_trt_1_hybrids_heatmap_PH)
rownames(rep_trt_1_hybrids_heatmap_PH) = rep_trt_1_hybrids_heatmap_PH[,1]
rep_trt_1_hybrids_heatmap_PH <- rep_trt_1_hybrids_heatmap_PH[,-1]

#autoscoring <- dist(lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1) # method="man" # is a bit better
#cluster <- hclust(autoscoring, method = "complete")
#plot(cluster)


rep_mat = as.matrix(rep_trt_1_hybrids_heatmap_PH)
#rep_mat$trt = NULL
rep_mat_scaled = scale(rep_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(rep_mat_scaled), method="ward.D2")
plot(hc, main="replicate clustering")
```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1_hybrids_heatmap_PH)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = TRUE,show_colnames=TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50),display_numbers = TRUE,
         number_color = "black", 
         fontsize_number = 8)
```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
rep_trt_1_hybrids_heatmap = rep_trt_1_hybrids_density[,c(25:49)]

rep_trt_1_hybrids_density_heatmap_PH = rep_trt_1_hybrids_density %>% dplyr::select(pH_delta_PH,Total_Nitrogen_delta_PH,Potassium_delta_PH,Phosphorus_delta_PH,OM_delta_PH,CEC_delta_PH,Clay_delta_PH,soil_moisture_delta_PH)
rep_trt_1_hybrids_density_heatmap_PH = as.data.frame(rep_trt_1_hybrids_density_heatmap_PH)
rownames(rep_trt_1_hybrids_density_heatmap_PH) = rep_trt_1_hybrids_density_heatmap_PH[,1]
rep_trt_1_hybrids_density_heatmap_PH <- rep_trt_1_hybrids_density_heatmap_PH[,-1]

#autoscoring <- dist(lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1) # method="man" # is a bit better
#cluster <- hclust(autoscoring, method = "complete")
#plot(cluster)


rep_mat = as.matrix(rep_trt_1_hybrids_density_heatmap_PH)
#rep_mat$trt = NULL
rep_mat_scaled = scale(rep_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(rep_mat_scaled), method="ward.D2")
plot(hc, main="replicate clustering")
```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1_hybrids_density_heatmap_PH)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = TRUE,show_colnames=TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50),display_numbers = TRUE,
         number_color = "black", 
         fontsize_number = 8)
```

### Delta (Planting - Application)

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
rep_trt_1_hybrids_heatmap = rep_trt_1_hybrids[,c(25:49)]

rep_trt_1_hybrids_heatmap_PA = rep_trt_1_hybrids %>% dplyr::select(pH_delta_PA,Total_Nitrogen_delta_PA,Potassium_delta_PA,Phosphorus_delta_PA,OM_delta_PA,CEC_delta_PA,Clay_delta_PA,soil_moisture_delta_PA)
rep_trt_1_hybrids_heatmap_PA = as.data.frame(rep_trt_1_hybrids_heatmap_PA)
rownames(rep_trt_1_hybrids_heatmap_PA) = rep_trt_1_hybrids_heatmap_PA[,1]
rep_trt_1_hybrids_heatmap_PA <- rep_trt_1_hybrids_heatmap_PA[,-1]

#autoscoring <- dist(lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1) # method="man" # is a bit better
#cluster <- hclust(autoscoring, method = "complete")
#plot(cluster)


rep_mat = as.matrix(rep_trt_1_hybrids_heatmap_PA)
#rep_mat$trt = NULL
rep_mat_scaled = scale(rep_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(rep_mat_scaled), method="ward.D2")
plot(hc, main="replicate clustering")
```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1_hybrids_heatmap_PA)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = TRUE,show_colnames=TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50),display_numbers = TRUE,
         number_color = "black", 
         fontsize_number = 8)
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
#rep_trt_1_hybrids_heatmap = rep_trt_1_hybrids_density[,c(25:49)]

rep_trt_1_hybrids_density_heatmap_PH = rep_trt_1_hybrids_density %>% dplyr::select(pH_delta_PA,Total_Nitrogen_delta_PA,Potassium_delta_PA,Phosphorus_delta_PA,OM_delta_PA,CEC_delta_PA,Clay_delta_PA,soil_moisture_delta_PA)
rep_trt_1_hybrids_density_heatmap_PH = as.data.frame(rep_trt_1_hybrids_density_heatmap_PH)
rownames(rep_trt_1_hybrids_density_heatmap_PH) = rep_trt_1_hybrids_density_heatmap_PH[,1]
rep_trt_1_hybrids_density_heatmap_PH <- rep_trt_1_hybrids_density_heatmap_PH[,-1]

#autoscoring <- dist(lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1) # method="man" # is a bit better
#cluster <- hclust(autoscoring, method = "complete")
#plot(cluster)


rep_mat = as.matrix(rep_trt_1_hybrids_density_heatmap_PH)
#rep_mat$trt = NULL
rep_mat_scaled = scale(rep_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(rep_mat_scaled), method="ward.D2")
plot(hc, main="replicate clustering")
```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1_hybrids_density_heatmap_PH)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = TRUE,show_colnames=TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50),display_numbers = TRUE,
         number_color = "black", 
         fontsize_number = 8)
```

### Delta (Harvest - Application)

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
rep_trt_1_hybrids_heatmap = rep_trt_1_hybrids[,c(25:49)]

rep_trt_1_hybrids_heatmap_AH = rep_trt_1_hybrids %>% dplyr::select(pH_delta_AH,Total_Nitrogen_delta_AH,Potassium_delta_AH,Phosphorus_delta_AH,OM_delta_AH,CEC_delta_AH,Clay_delta_AH,soil_moisture_delta_AH)
rep_trt_1_hybrids_heatmap_AH = as.data.frame(rep_trt_1_hybrids_heatmap_AH)
rownames(rep_trt_1_hybrids_heatmap_AH) = rep_trt_1_hybrids_heatmap_AH[,1]
rep_trt_1_hybrids_heatmap_AH <- rep_trt_1_hybrids_heatmap_AH[,-1]

#autoscoring <- dist(lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1) # method="man" # is a bit better
#cluster <- hclust(autoscoring, method = "complete")
#plot(cluster)


rep_mat = as.matrix(rep_trt_1_hybrids_heatmap_AH)
#rep_mat$trt = NULL
rep_mat_scaled = scale(rep_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(rep_mat_scaled), method="ward.D2")
plot(hc, main="replicate clustering")
```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1_hybrids_heatmap_AH)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = TRUE,show_colnames=TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50),display_numbers = TRUE,
         number_color = "black", 
         fontsize_number = 8)
```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
#rep_trt_1_hybrids_heatmap = rep_trt_1_hybrids_density[,c(25:49)]

rep_trt_1_hybrids_density_heatmap_PH = rep_trt_1_hybrids_density %>% dplyr::select(pH_delta_AH,Total_Nitrogen_delta_AH,Potassium_delta_AH,Phosphorus_delta_AH,OM_delta_AH,CEC_delta_AH,Clay_delta_AH,soil_moisture_delta_AH)
rep_trt_1_hybrids_density_heatmap_PH = as.data.frame(rep_trt_1_hybrids_density_heatmap_PH)
rownames(rep_trt_1_hybrids_density_heatmap_PH) = rep_trt_1_hybrids_density_heatmap_PH[,1]
rep_trt_1_hybrids_density_heatmap_PH <- rep_trt_1_hybrids_density_heatmap_PH[,-1]

#autoscoring <- dist(lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1) # method="man" # is a bit better
#cluster <- hclust(autoscoring, method = "complete")
#plot(cluster)


rep_mat = as.matrix(rep_trt_1_hybrids_density_heatmap_PH)
#rep_mat$trt = NULL
rep_mat_scaled = scale(rep_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(rep_mat_scaled), method="ward.D2")
plot(hc, main="replicate clustering")
```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1_hybrids_density_heatmap_PH)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = TRUE,show_colnames=TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50),display_numbers = TRUE,
         number_color = "black", 
         fontsize_number = 8)
```

## Clustering based on all plot level observations & soil characteristics at planting

```{r echo=F}
rep_trt_1_obs_1 = bind_cols(rep_trt_1_obs,rep_trt_1_soil)

rep_mat = as.matrix(rep_trt_1_obs_1[,c(-19,-28)])
#rep_mat$trt = NULL
rep_mat_scaled = scale(rep_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(rep_mat_scaled), method="ward.D2")
plot(hc, main="replicate clustering")

```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}

row.names(rep_trt_1_obs_1) = rep_trt_1_obs_1$rep...19
rep_trt_1_obs_1$rep...19 = NULL
rep_trt_1_obs_1$rep...28 = NULL

#rep_trt_1_obs = rep_trt_1

#rep_trt_2 = rep_trt_1_obs_1

#rep_trt_2 <- rep_trt_2[,-19]


pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1_obs_1)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = TRUE,show_colnames=TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50))
```

## Clustering based on all plot level observations & soil characteristics after application

```{r echo=F}
rep_trt_1_obs_1 = bind_cols(rep_trt_1_obs,rep_trt_1_soil_application)

rep_mat = as.matrix(rep_trt_1_obs_1[,c(-19,-28)])
#rep_mat$trt = NULL
rep_mat_scaled = scale(rep_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(rep_mat_scaled), method="ward.D2")
plot(hc, main="replicate clustering")

```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}

row.names(rep_trt_1_obs_1) = rep_trt_1_obs_1$rep...19
rep_trt_1_obs_1$rep...19 = NULL
rep_trt_1_obs_1$rep...28 = NULL

#rep_trt_1_obs = rep_trt_1

#rep_trt_2 = rep_trt_1_obs_1

#rep_trt_2 <- rep_trt_2[,-19]


pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1_obs_1)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = TRUE,show_colnames=TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50))
```


## Clustering based on all plot level observations & soil characteristics after harvest

```{r echo=F}
rep_trt_1_obs_1 = bind_cols(rep_trt_1_obs,rep_trt_1_soil_harvest)

rep_mat = as.matrix(rep_trt_1_obs_1[,c(-19,-28)])
#rep_mat$trt = NULL
rep_mat_scaled = scale(rep_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(rep_mat_scaled), method="ward.D2")
plot(hc, main="replicate clustering")

```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}

row.names(rep_trt_1_obs_1) = rep_trt_1_obs_1$rep...19
rep_trt_1_obs_1$rep...19 = NULL
rep_trt_1_obs_1$rep...28 = NULL

#rep_trt_1_obs = rep_trt_1

#rep_trt_2 = rep_trt_1_obs_1

#rep_trt_2 <- rep_trt_2[,-19]


pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1_obs_1)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = TRUE,show_colnames=TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50))
```

## Clustering based on Drone measurements - 7th September 


```{r, echo=F}



turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:7,283,284:291)]




rep_trt_1 = turkey_data_yield %>% group_by(replicate) %>% summarise(NIR_Sept7th = mean(`Band: Nir 07-09-2025`, na.rm=T),Red_Sept7th = mean(`Band: Red 07-09-2025`, na.rm=T),CIG_Sept7th = mean(`Index: CIG 07-09-2025`, na.rm=T),CIRE_Sept7th = mean(`Index: CIRE 07-09-2025`, na.rm=T),NDRE_Sept7th = mean(`Index: NDRE 07-09-2025`, na.rm=T),NDVI_Sept7th = mean(`Index: NDVI 07-09-2025`, na.rm=T),NDWI_Sept7th = mean(`Index: NDWI 07-09-2025`, na.rm=T),GNDVI_Sept7th = mean(`Index: GNDVI 07-09-2025`, na.rm=T), .groups ="drop") #%>% unite(trt,HYBRID, DENSITY,APPLICATION ) #%>% pivot_wider(names_from=trt, values_from=Total_Nitrogen)





rep_trt_1  = rep_trt_1 %>% mutate(rep = paste("Rep_",replicate, sep=""))
rep_trt_1$replicate = NULL

#lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1 = lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test %>% spread(trait_code,final_rank)



rep_mat = as.matrix(rep_trt_1[,-9])
#rep_mat$trt = NULL
rep_mat_scaled = scale(rep_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(rep_mat_scaled), method="ward.D2")
plot(hc, main="replicate clustering")
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}

row.names(rep_trt_1) = as.factor(rep_trt_1$rep)

rep_trt_1 <- rep_trt_1[,-9]

#pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = FALSE,show_rownames=TRUE, color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50))
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50))
```


# Clustering based on Drone measurements - 17th September 


```{r echo=F}



turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:7,367:375)]




rep_trt_1 = turkey_data_yield %>% group_by(replicate) %>% summarise(NIR_Sept17th = mean(`Band: Nir 09-17-2025`, na.rm=T),Red_Sept17th= mean(`Band: Red 09-17-2025`, na.rm=T),CIG_Sept17th = mean(`Index: CIG 09-17-2025`, na.rm=T),CIRE_Sept17thh = mean(`Index: CIRE 09-17-2025`, na.rm=T),NDRE_Sept17th = mean(`Index: NDRE 09-17-2025`, na.rm=T),NDVI_Sept17th = mean(`Index: NDVI 09-17-2025`, na.rm=T),NDWI_Sept17thh = mean(`Index: NDWI 09-17-2025`, na.rm=T),GNDVI_Sept17th = mean(`Index: GNDVI 09-17-2025`, na.rm=T), .groups ="drop") #%>% unite(trt,HYBRID, DENSITY,APPLICATION ) #%>% pivot_wider(names_from=trt, values_from=Total_Nitrogen)





rep_trt_1  = rep_trt_1 %>% mutate(rep = paste("Rep_",replicate, sep=""))
rep_trt_1$replicate = NULL

#lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1 = lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test %>% spread(trait_code,final_rank)



rep_mat = as.matrix(rep_trt_1[,-9])
#rep_mat$trt = NULL
rep_mat_scaled = scale(rep_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(rep_mat_scaled), method="ward.D2")
plot(hc, main="replicate clustering")
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}

row.names(rep_trt_1) = as.factor(rep_trt_1$rep)

rep_trt_1 <- rep_trt_1[,-9]

#pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(rep_trt_1),  scale="column",cluster_cols = FALSE,show_rownames=FALSE, color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50))
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50))
```


# Statistical analysis 

## Model outliers detection

1) **outlier analysis: By location mixed effect model**

- Model used: Linear mixed effect (LME) ANOVA model using R

- Fixed variable: HYBRIDS , plant_density, TREATMENTS, HYBRIDS:plant_density:TREATMENTS

- Random variables: replicate, replicate:HYBRIDS,replicate:plant_density,replicate:TREATMENTS







```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
###Function which flags plot values with DSR > threshold for DSR traits 
data_with_model_outlier_check_by_location = function(dataset, dsr.threshold){
  outlier.df = NULL
  for(i in 1:length(traits)){
  #dataset$id = seq(1,dim(dataset)[1],1)
    #print(traits[i])
  ## Subsetting only for the DSR trait
    temp = dataset %>% filter(type == traits[i])
    temp$row_number=rownames(temp)
  ## Subsetting based on missing data
    #temp = temp[temp$MissingDataFlag==FALSE,]
  
  ## Fitting the simple model
     model = lmer(value ~ as.factor(HYBRID)  * as.factor(plant_density) *as.factor(APPLICATION)+ (1|replicate)+ (1|replicate:HYBRID)+ (1|replicate:plant_density)+(1|replicate:APPLICATION)+(1|replicate:HYBRID:plant_density),data=temp)
  
  
  ## Calculating Studentized residuals, and taking absolute values
    Stud.Residual = abs(stats::rstudent(model))
    #print(length(Stud.Residual))
  ## Appending DSR values to the existing table
    sr.df=as.data.frame(Stud.Residual)
    sr.df$row_number=rownames(sr.df)
    temp = temp%>% left_join(sr.df)
    #temp = as.data.frame(cbind(temp,Stud.Residual))
    temp$trait = traits[i]
  
  ## Flagging DSR outlier based on threshold
    temp$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag = ifelse(abs(temp$Stud.Residual)>dsr.threshold,TRUE,FALSE)
  
  ## Merging with original dataset
  #temp = temp[,c("id","Stud.Residual","DSR_outlier_flag")]
  #dataset1 = merge(dataset,temp,by = "id", all.x = TRUE)
  #dataset1 = dataset1[,-1]
  outlier.df = rbind(outlier.df,temp)
  }
  return(outlier.df)
}
#model SSC vs DKC
model_ssc_dkc = function(ssc_data_no_nas_ssc){
 mmod <- lmer(value ~ Irrigation  * hybrid + (1|Location/Rep)+ (1|Location:Irrigation)+ +(1|Location:Irrigation:hybrid) ,data=ssc_data_no_nas_ssc)
 

  lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~Irrigation:hybrid)  
  #lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~Irrigation:interrow_width)  
  lsm1.df = multcomp::cld(lsm1,alpha=0.1,Letters=LETTERS,sort=TRUE,adjust="tukey")
  
  lsm1.df = as.data.frame(lsm1.df)
  
#plot_lsmeans(lsm1.df)

  lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~Irrigation:hybrid)  

delta1 = emmeans::contrast(lsm1,method="pairwise")
  delta1.df = as.data.frame(summary(delta1,adjust="Tukey"))
  delta1.df= delta1.df %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 2)
  delta1.df = delta1.df %>% mutate(Significance=ifelse(p.value<0.05, "Significant", ifelse(p.value >= 0.05 & p.value<0.1,"Significant","Not significant")))
 
 print(anova(mmod))
anv = as.data.frame(anova(mmod))
  #Protocol = rep(unique(test.set$PROTOCOL),dim(anv)[1])
 # Set = rep(unique(test.set$SET),dim(anv)[1])
  #Effect = row.names(anv)
  #anova.table = data.frame(Protocol,Effect,anv[,2:dim(anv)[2]])
  anv$CV = sjstats::cv(mmod)*100
  #anv$marginal_rsquared = round(MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(model)[1],2)
  #anv$rsquared = round(MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(mmod)[2],2)
  anv= anv %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 3)
  anv = anv %>% mutate(pvalue= format.pval(`Pr(>F)`,digits=2, eps=0.001, nsmall=3))
  

  
  #lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~Irrigation:interrow_width)  


  return(list(anv,lsm1.df,delta1.df))
 
}

#model ssc vs dkc low yielding
model_ssc_dkc_low = function(ssc_data_no_nas_ssc){
  mmod <- lmer(value ~ Irrigation  * hybrid + (1|Rep) ,data=ssc_data_no_nas_ssc)
 

  lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~Irrigation:hybrid)  
  #lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~Irrigation:interrow_width)  
  lsm1.df = multcomp::cld(lsm1,alpha=0.1,Letters=LETTERS,sort=TRUE,adjust="tukey")
  
  lsm1.df = as.data.frame(lsm1.df)
  
#plot_lsmeans(lsm1.df)

  lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~Irrigation:hybrid)  

delta1 = emmeans::contrast(lsm1,method="pairwise")
  delta1.df = as.data.frame(summary(delta1,adjust="Tukey"))
  delta1.df= delta1.df %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 2)
  delta1.df = delta1.df %>% mutate(Significance=ifelse(p.value<0.05, "Significant", ifelse(p.value >= 0.05 & p.value<0.1,"Significant","Not significant")))
 
 print(anova(mmod))
anv = as.data.frame(anova(mmod))
  #Protocol = rep(unique(test.set$PROTOCOL),dim(anv)[1])
 # Set = rep(unique(test.set$SET),dim(anv)[1])
  #Effect = row.names(anv)
  #anova.table = data.frame(Protocol,Effect,anv[,2:dim(anv)[2]])
  anv$CV = sjstats::cv(mmod)*100
  #anv$marginal_rsquared = round(MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(model)[1],2)
  #anv$rsquared = round(MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(mmod)[2],2)
  anv= anv %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 3)
  anv = anv %>% mutate(pvalue= format.pval(`Pr(>F)`,digits=2, eps=0.001, nsmall=3))
  

  
  #lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~Irrigation:interrow_width)  


  return(list(anv,lsm1.df,delta1.df))
 
}

#


#lsmeans, delta for ssc only
model_ssc_only = function(ssc_data_no_nas_ssc){
 mmod = lmer(value ~ as.factor(HYBRIDS)  * as.factor(TREATMENTS) + (1|replicate)+ (1|replicate:HYBRIDS),data=ssc_data_no_nas_ssc)
 
 #print(anova(mmod))
anv = as.data.frame(anova(mmod))
  #Protocol = rep(unique(test.set$PROTOCOL),dim(anv)[1])
 # Set = rep(unique(test.set$SET),dim(anv)[1])
  #Effect = row.names(anv)
  #anova.table = data.frame(Protocol,Effect,anv[,2:dim(anv)[2]])
  anv$CV = sjstats::cv(mmod)*100
  #anv$marginal_rsquared = round(MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(model)[1],2)
  #anv$rsquared = round(MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(mmod)[2],2)
  anv= anv %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 3)
  anv = anv %>% mutate(pvalue= format.pval(`Pr(>F)`,digits=2, eps=0.001, nsmall=3))
  
  lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~HYBRIDS:TREATMENTS)  
  #lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~Irrigation:interrow_width)  
  lsm1.df = multcomp::cld(lsm1,alpha=0.1,Letters=LETTERS,sort=TRUE,adjust="tukey")
  
  lsm1.df = as.data.frame(lsm1.df)
  
  #lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~Irrigation:interrow_width)  

delta1 = emmeans::contrast(lsm1,method="pairwise")
  delta1.df = as.data.frame(summary(delta1,adjust="Tukey"))
  delta1.df= delta1.df %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 2)
  delta1.df = delta1.df %>% mutate(Significance=ifelse(p.value<0.05, "Significant", ifelse(p.value >= 0.05 & p.value<0.1,"Significant","Not significant")))
  return(list(anv,lsm1.df,delta1.df))
 
}


#across location

across_location = function(data_df_long){
  traits = unique(data_df_long$trait)
  analysis_type="Across locations"
  means.df = NULL
  anova.df=NULL
  delta_table = NULL
  for(i in 1:length(traits)){
    #print(traits[i])
    temp = filter(data_df_long, type == traits[i])
    #temp = filter(data_df_long, trait == traits[i])
    #temp_wide=temp %>% spread(trait, value)
   model = lmer(value ~ irrigation_percent  * hybrid_interrow_width_cm + (1|Location/Replicate)+ (1|Location:irrigation_percent)+ +(1|Location:irrigation_percent:hybrid_interrow_width_cm) ,data=temp)
    anova_table= create_anova_table_new(model,temp,traits[i],analysis_type)
    anova_table$Field = NULL
    anova_table$Trait= traits[i]
     anova_table$number_of_trials= length(unique(data_df_long$Location))
      #means.df = rbind(means.df,lsm.df)
      #anova.df=rbind(anova.df,anova_table)
      lsm.df = create_OneFactor_lsmeans_table_new(model, temp,traits[i],analysis_type)
      lsm.df$Field = NULL
    lsm.df$Trait= traits[i]
     lsm.df$number_of_trials= length(unique(data_df_long$Location))
      #lsm.df$Field = traits[i]
      #anova_table= create_anova_table_new(model,temp,traits[i],analysis_type)
      means.df = rbind(means.df,lsm.df)
      anova.df=rbind(anova.df,anova_table)
      delta.df = create_OneFactor_Contrast_Table_new(model,temp,traits[i],analysis_type)
      delta.df$Field = NULL
    delta.df$Trait= traits[i]
    delta.df$number_of_trials= length(unique(data_df_long$Location))
      delta_table = rbind(delta_table,delta.df)
  }
  
return(list(means.df,anova.df,delta_table))
}

create_OneFactor_lsmeans_table_new = function(model,test.set,field,analysis_type){
  lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(model,~irrigation_percent:hybrid_interrow_width_cm)  
  lsm1.df = multcomp::cld(lsm1,alpha=0.1,Letters=LETTERS,sort=TRUE,adjust="tukey")
  #Factor = rep("Treatment1",dim(lsm1.df)[1])
  #Protocol = rep(unique(test.set$Protocol),dim(lsm1.df)[1])
  #Set = rep(unique(test.set$SET),dim(lsm1.df)[1])
  names(lsm1.df)[1] = "Level"
  #print(names(lsm1.df))
  lsm1.df = data.frame(lsm1.df$Level,lsm1.df$hybrid_interrow_width_cm,lsm1.df$lsmean,lsm1.df$SE,lsm1.df$df,lsm1.df$lower.CL,lsm1.df$upper.CL,lsm1.df$.group)
  names(lsm1.df) = c("Factor","Group1","lsmean","SE","DF","Lower_CI","Upper_CI","Group")
  lsm1.df$Field = field
  lsm1.df$analysis_type=analysis_type
  lsm1.df= lsm1.df %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 2)
  return(lsm1.df)
}

create_anova_table_new = function(model,test.set, field,analysis_type){
  anv = as.data.frame(anova(model))
  Protocol = rep(unique(test.set$PROTOCOL),dim(anv)[1])
 # Set = rep(unique(test.set$SET),dim(anv)[1])
  #Effect = row.names(anv)
  #anova.table = data.frame(Protocol,Effect,anv[,2:dim(anv)[2]])
  anv$CV = sjstats::cv(model)*100
  #anv$marginal_rsquared = round(MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(model)[1],2)
  #anv$rsquared = round(MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(model)[2],2)
  anv= anv %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 3)
  anv = anv %>% mutate(pvalue= format.pval(`Pr(>F)`,digits=2, eps=0.001, nsmall=3))
  anv$Field = field
  anv$analysis_type = analysis_type
  
anv = anv %>% mutate(Significance=ifelse(`Pr(>F)`<0.05, "Significant","Not significant"))
#https://davidgohel.github.io/flextable/articles/format.html
#print(names(anv))
anv = anv[c(9,10,2,3,5:8,11)]
 # anova.table$Num.Fields = n.fields
#  anova.table$Trait = trait.name
  #colnames(anova.table) = c("Protocol","Effect","numDF","denDF","F-value","P-value","CV")
  #anv$field=field
  
  return(anv)
}


create_OneFactor_Contrast_Table_new = function(model,test.set, field,analysis_type){
  lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(model,~irrigation_percent:hybrid_interrow_width_cm)
  delta1 = emmeans::contrast(lsm1,method="pairwise")
  delta1.df = as.data.frame(summary(delta1,adjust="Tukey"))
  Factor = rep("Treatment1",dim(delta1.df)[1])
  #Protocol = rep(unique(test.set$PROTOCOL),dim(delta1.df)[1])
  #Set = rep(unique(test.set$SET),dim(delta1.df)[1])
  
  ## separating contrast column to treatment 1 and treatment 2
  
  delta1.df = delta1.df %>% mutate(Significance=ifelse(p.value<0.05, "Significant", ifelse(p.value >= 0.05 & p.value<0.1,"Significant","Not significant")))
  ## Parsing the Contrast column and generating the first and second columns
  # contrast.rcbd = as.character(delta1.df$contrast)
  # V1 = character(length = dim(delta1.df)[1])
  # V2 = character(length = dim(delta1.df)[1])
  # for(j in 1:dim(delta1.df)[1]){
  #   contrast.part = strsplit(contrast.rcbd[j]," - ")
  #   V1[j] = contrast.part[[1]][1]
  #   V2[j] = contrast.part[[1]][2]
  # }
  # delta1.df = data.frame(Protocol,Set,Factor,V1,V2,delta1.df$estimate,delta1.df$p.value) 
  # delta1.df$sig.1 = ifelse(delta1.df$delta1.df.p.value<0.1,TRUE,FALSE)
  # names(delta1.df) = c("Protocol","Set","Factor","V1","V2","Diff","Pvalue","Sig_At_10percent")
  #delta1.df$Observation = field
  delta1.df$Field=field
  delta1.df$analysis_type = analysis_type
  return(delta1.df)
}

# ssc_data_model = ssc_data_all[,c(1:14,32,39,44:47,52)]
# ssc_data_model = filter(ssc_data_model, country=="greece")
# #ssc_data_model_1 = filter(ssc_data_model, )
# ssc_data_long = ssc_data_model%>% gather(type, value, 14:20)
# ssc_data_long = filter(ssc_data_long,type!="yield_t_per_ha")
# ssc_data_long = filter(ssc_data_long, !is.na(value))
# ssc_data_long$value = as.double(ssc_data_long$value )
# traits = unique(ssc_data_long$type)
# all_locations = unique(ssc_data_all$Location)
# ssc_data_outlier = data.frame()
#   for (i in 1:length(all_locations)){
#   
#   outlier_data = data_with_model_outlier_check_by_location(ssc_data_long,3.5)
#   table(outlier_data$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)
#   ssc_data_outlier = rbind(ssc_data_outlier,outlier_data )
#   }
names(turkey_data_long)[6] = "plant_density"

turkey_data_long_1 = filter(turkey_data_long, type %in% c("dry_yield_t_ha","Grain Protein","Stalk Protein","Grain N %","Stalk N%","Nitrogen Utilization Efficiency","Nitrogen Uptake Efficiency","Nitrogen Use Efficiency" ,"NUE_kg_per_kg_totalN","Index: CIRE 07-09-2025","Index: NDRE 07-09-2025","Index: GNDVI 07-09-2025" ,"Index: CIRE 09-17-2025","Index: NDRE 09-17-2025" ,"Index: GNDVI 09-17-2025"))

#turkey_data_irr_long_1 = turkey_data_irr_long_1 %>% separate(HYBRIDS, into=c("hybrid_name","plant_density"),sep="_",remove=F)

traits = unique(turkey_data_long_1$type)
turkey_data_long_1$value = as.double(turkey_data_long_1$value )
#turkey_data_irr_long$value = as.double(turkey_data_irr_long$value )
  outlier_data = data_with_model_outlier_check_by_location(turkey_data_long_1,3.5)


table(outlier_data$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)


ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier = filter(outlier_data,DSR_by_location_outlier_flag==FALSE )
#table(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

DT::datatable(outlier_data, filter="top")

```






```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10,fig.width=10}


#only SSCs
  ssc_data=ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier
 


#ssc_data_no_nas_ssc = ssc_data_high_ye%>% filter(hybrid %in% c("EW6846"))
   library(multcompView)
ssc_data$HYBRIDS = as.factor(ssc_data$HYBRID )
ssc_data$TREATMENTS = as.factor(ssc_data$APPLICATION)
ssc_data$replicate  = as.factor(ssc_data$replicate  )
ssc_data$plant_density  = as.factor(ssc_data$plant_density  )
#ssc_data = filter(ssc_data, !replicate %in% c("1","2"))

#STANDART 100


#DT::datatable(lsmeans_results_ps, filter="top")

#DT::datatable(contrast_results, filter="top")

```




## Statistical analysis of yield 

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=10}

ssc_data_1 = filter(ssc_data,type=="dry_yield_t_ha")

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% mutate(hybrid_name = ifelse(HYBRID =="EX6658-95","EX6658",ifelse(HYBRID =="EW6846-95","EW6846",HYBRID)))

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% separate(HYBRIDS, into=c("hybrid_name","plant_density"),sep="_",remove=F)

library(agricolae)
model<-with(ssc_data_1,ssp.plot(replicate,HYBRIDS,plant_density,TREATMENTS,value ))
gla<-model$gl.a; glb<-model$gl.b; glc<-model$gl.c
Ea<-model$Ea; Eb<-model$Eb; Ec<-model$Ec
op<-par(mfrow=c(1,3),cex=0.6)
out1<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,HYBRIDS,gla,Ea,console=TRUE))
out2<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,plant_density,glb,Eb,console=TRUE))
out3<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,TREATMENTS,glc,Ec,console=TRUE))
plot(out1,xlab="hybrid_name",las=1,variation="IQR")
plot(out2,xlab="plant_density",variation="IQR")
plot(out3,xlab="Fertilization_level",variation="IQR")
attach(ssc_data_1)






```

## Statistical analysis of yield - Excluding replicate 1

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=14}
ssc_data_no_1 = filter(ssc_data, !replicate %in% c("1"))

ssc_data_1 = filter(ssc_data_no_1,type=="dry_yield_t_ha")

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% mutate(hybrid_name = ifelse(HYBRID =="EX6658-95","EX6658",ifelse(HYBRID =="EW6846-95","EW6846",HYBRID)))

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% separate(HYBRIDS, into=c("hybrid_name","plant_density"),sep="_",remove=F)

library(agricolae)
model<-with(ssc_data_1,ssp.plot(replicate,HYBRIDS,plant_density,TREATMENTS,value ))
gla<-model$gl.a; glb<-model$gl.b; glc<-model$gl.c
Ea<-model$Ea; Eb<-model$Eb; Ec<-model$Ec
op<-par(mfrow=c(1,3),cex=0.6)
out1<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,HYBRIDS,gla,Ea,console=TRUE))
out2<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,plant_density,glb,Eb,console=TRUE))
out3<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,TREATMENTS,glc,Ec,console=TRUE))
plot(out1,xlab="hybrid_name",las=1,variation="IQR")
plot(out2,xlab="plant_density",variation="IQR")
plot(out3,xlab="Fertilization_level",variation="IQR")
attach(ssc_data_1)

LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = HYBRIDS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield, t/ha)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = plant_density,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("plant_density")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield, t/ha)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = TREATMENTS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("TREATMENTS")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield, t/ha)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)

# Interaction (varieties:fertilizer)
LSD_ABC = LSD.test(y = value,
                  trt = as.factor(HYBRIDS):as.factor(plant_density):as.factor(TREATMENTS),
                  DFerror = model$gl.c,
                  MSerror = model$Ec,
                  alpha = 0.1,
                  p.adj = "BH",
                  group = TRUE,
                  console = TRUE)




lsmeans = LSD_ABC$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_ABC)
groups = LSD_ABC$groups
groups$hybrid__Target_density = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)



lsmeans = lsmeans %>% separate(hybrid__Target_density, into=c("hybrid","density","fertilization"),sep=":",remove=F)

#lsmeans = lsmeans %>% mutate(stress = ifelse(Irrigation_percent =="100","NS","S"))

lsmeans = lsmeans %>% unite(hybrid__density,hybrid,density, sep="_",remove=F)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid__Target_density,-value),value, fill=fertilization))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_fertilization")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield, t/ha)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
```
