```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=14}
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("TREATMENTS")+ylab(" LSMeans (Nitrogen Use Efficiency)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)

# Interaction (varieties:fertilizer)
LSD_ABC = LSD.test(y = value,
                  trt = as.factor(HYBRIDS):as.factor(plant_density):as.factor(TREATMENTS),
                  DFerror = model$gl.c,
                  MSerror = model$Ec,
                  alpha = 0.1,
                  p.adj = "BH",
                  group = TRUE,
                  console = TRUE)




lsmeans = LSD_ABC$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_ABC)
groups = LSD_ABC$groups
groups$hybrid__Target_density = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)



lsmeans = lsmeans %>% separate(hybrid__Target_density, into=c("hybrid","density","fertilization"),sep=":",remove=F)

#lsmeans = lsmeans %>% mutate(stress = ifelse(Irrigation_percent =="100","NS","S"))

lsmeans = lsmeans %>% unite(hybrid__density,hybrid,density, sep="_",remove=F)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid__Target_density,-value),value, fill=fertilization))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_fertilization")+ylab(" LSMeans (Nitrogen Use Efficiency)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 5, group = hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(hybrid__Target_density,value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_fertilization")+ylab(" LSMeans (Nitrogen Use Efficiency)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 5, group = hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

lsmeans_1 = lsmeans %>% mutate(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot = ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130K:HIGH 125","01_DKC6648SC:130K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130K:FLOWERING 75","02_DKC6648SC:130K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130K:TOTAL 75","03_DKC6648SC:130K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95K:HIGH 125","04_DKC6648SC:95K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95K:FLOWERING 75","05_DKC6648SC:95K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95K:TOTAL 75","06_DKC6648SC:95K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130K:HIGH 125","07_DKC7236SC:130K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130K:FLOWERING 75","08_DKC7236SC:130K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130K:TOTAL 75","09_DKC7236SC:130K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95K:HIGH 125","10_DKC7236SC:95K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95K:FLOWERING 75","11_DKC7236SC:95K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95K:TOTAL 75","12_DKC7236SC:95K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130K:HIGH 125","13_DKC6761:130K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130K:FLOWERING 75","14_DKC6761:130K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130K:TOTAL 75","15_DKC6761:130K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95K:HIGH 125","16_DKC6761:95K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95K:FLOWERING 75","17_DKC6761:95K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95K:TOTAL 75","18_DKC6761:95K:TOTAL 75",hybrid__Target_density)))))))))))))))))))



#print(plot_lsmeans)

#write_csv(lsmeans,paste(trial_id, "Grain_dry_yield_statistical_means.csv",sep="_"))





```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=15}
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_1,aes(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot,value, fill=fertilization))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_fertilization")+ylab(" LSMeans (Nitrogen Use Efficiency)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 0.5, group = hybrid__interrow_cm_plot), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+facet_grid(~hybrid__density, scales="free_x")
print(plot_lsmeans)

```

## Statistical analysis of CIRE - Excluding replicate 1

### Index: CIRE 07-09-2025

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=14}
ssc_data_no_1 = filter(ssc_data, !replicate %in% c("1"))

ssc_data_1 = filter(ssc_data_no_1,type=="Index: CIRE 07-09-2025")

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% mutate(hybrid_name = ifelse(HYBRID =="EX6658-95","EX6658",ifelse(HYBRID =="EW6846-95","EW6846",HYBRID)))

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% separate(HYBRIDS, into=c("hybrid_name","plant_density"),sep="_",remove=F)

library(agricolae)
model<-with(ssc_data_1,ssp.plot(replicate,HYBRIDS,plant_density,TREATMENTS,value ))
gla<-model$gl.a; glb<-model$gl.b; glc<-model$gl.c
Ea<-model$Ea; Eb<-model$Eb; Ec<-model$Ec
op<-par(mfrow=c(1,3),cex=0.6)
out1<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,HYBRIDS,gla,Ea,console=TRUE))
out2<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,plant_density,glb,Eb,console=TRUE))
out3<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,TREATMENTS,glc,Ec,console=TRUE))
#plot(out1,xlab="hybrid_name",las=1,variation="IQR")
#plot(out2,xlab="plant_density",variation="IQR")
#plot(out3,xlab="Fertilization_level",variation="IQR")
attach(ssc_data_1)

LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = HYBRIDS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: CIRE 07-09-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = plant_density,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("plant_density")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: CIRE 07-09-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = TREATMENTS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("TREATMENTS")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: CIRE 07-09-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)

# Interaction (varieties:fertilizer)
LSD_ABC = LSD.test(y = value,
                  trt = as.factor(HYBRIDS):as.factor(plant_density):as.factor(TREATMENTS),
                  DFerror = model$gl.c,
                  MSerror = model$Ec,
                  alpha = 0.1,
                  p.adj = "BH",
                  group = TRUE,
                  console = TRUE)




lsmeans = LSD_ABC$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_ABC)
groups = LSD_ABC$groups
groups$hybrid__Target_density = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)



lsmeans = lsmeans %>% separate(hybrid__Target_density, into=c("hybrid","density","fertilization"),sep=":",remove=F)

#lsmeans = lsmeans %>% mutate(stress = ifelse(Irrigation_percent =="100","NS","S"))

lsmeans = lsmeans %>% unite(hybrid__density,hybrid,density, sep="_",remove=F)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid__Target_density,-value),value, fill=fertilization))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_fertilization")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: CIRE 07-09-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 0.5, group = hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(hybrid__Target_density,value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_fertilization")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: CIRE 07-09-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 0.5, group = hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

lsmeans_1 = lsmeans %>% mutate(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot = ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130K:HIGH 125","01_DKC6648SC:130K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130K:FLOWERING 75","02_DKC6648SC:130K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130K:TOTAL 75","03_DKC6648SC:130K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95K:HIGH 125","04_DKC6648SC:95K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95K:FLOWERING 75","05_DKC6648SC:95K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95K:TOTAL 75","06_DKC6648SC:95K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130K:HIGH 125","07_DKC7236SC:130K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130K:FLOWERING 75","08_DKC7236SC:130K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130K:TOTAL 75","09_DKC7236SC:130K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95K:HIGH 125","10_DKC7236SC:95K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95K:FLOWERING 75","11_DKC7236SC:95K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95K:TOTAL 75","12_DKC7236SC:95K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130K:HIGH 125","13_DKC6761:130K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130K:FLOWERING 75","14_DKC6761:130K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130K:TOTAL 75","15_DKC6761:130K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95K:HIGH 125","16_DKC6761:95K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95K:FLOWERING 75","17_DKC6761:95K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95K:TOTAL 75","18_DKC6761:95K:TOTAL 75",hybrid__Target_density)))))))))))))))))))



#print(plot_lsmeans)

#write_csv(lsmeans,paste(trial_id, "Grain_dry_yield_statistical_means.csv",sep="_"))





```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=15}
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_1,aes(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot,value, fill=fertilization))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_fertilization")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: CIRE 07-09-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 0.5, group = hybrid__interrow_cm_plot), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+facet_grid(~hybrid__density, scales="free_x")
print(plot_lsmeans)

```

### Index: CIRE 09-17-2025

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=14}
ssc_data_no_1 = filter(ssc_data, !replicate %in% c("1"))

ssc_data_1 = filter(ssc_data_no_1,type=="Index: CIRE 09-17-2025")

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% mutate(hybrid_name = ifelse(HYBRID =="EX6658-95","EX6658",ifelse(HYBRID =="EW6846-95","EW6846",HYBRID)))

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% separate(HYBRIDS, into=c("hybrid_name","plant_density"),sep="_",remove=F)

library(agricolae)
model<-with(ssc_data_1,ssp.plot(replicate,HYBRIDS,plant_density,TREATMENTS,value ))
gla<-model$gl.a; glb<-model$gl.b; glc<-model$gl.c
Ea<-model$Ea; Eb<-model$Eb; Ec<-model$Ec
op<-par(mfrow=c(1,3),cex=0.6)
out1<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,HYBRIDS,gla,Ea,console=TRUE))
out2<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,plant_density,glb,Eb,console=TRUE))
out3<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,TREATMENTS,glc,Ec,console=TRUE))
#plot(out1,xlab="hybrid_name",las=1,variation="IQR")
#plot(out2,xlab="plant_density",variation="IQR")
#plot(out3,xlab="Fertilization_level",variation="IQR")
attach(ssc_data_1)

LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = HYBRIDS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: CIRE 09-17-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = plant_density,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("plant_density")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: CIRE 09-17-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = TREATMENTS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("TREATMENTS")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: CIRE 09-17-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)

# Interaction (varieties:fertilizer)
LSD_ABC = LSD.test(y = value,
                  trt = as.factor(HYBRIDS):as.factor(plant_density):as.factor(TREATMENTS),
                  DFerror = model$gl.c,
                  MSerror = model$Ec,
                  alpha = 0.1,
                  p.adj = "BH",
                  group = TRUE,
                  console = TRUE)




lsmeans = LSD_ABC$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_ABC)
groups = LSD_ABC$groups
groups$hybrid__Target_density = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)



lsmeans = lsmeans %>% separate(hybrid__Target_density, into=c("hybrid","density","fertilization"),sep=":",remove=F)

#lsmeans = lsmeans %>% mutate(stress = ifelse(Irrigation_percent =="100","NS","S"))

lsmeans = lsmeans %>% unite(hybrid__density,hybrid,density, sep="_",remove=F)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid__Target_density,-value),value, fill=fertilization))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_fertilization")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: CIRE 09-17-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 0.1, group = hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(hybrid__Target_density,value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_fertilization")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: CIRE 09-17-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 0.1, group = hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

lsmeans_1 = lsmeans %>% mutate(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot = ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130K:HIGH 125","01_DKC6648SC:130K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130K:FLOWERING 75","02_DKC6648SC:130K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130K:TOTAL 75","03_DKC6648SC:130K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95K:HIGH 125","04_DKC6648SC:95K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95K:FLOWERING 75","05_DKC6648SC:95K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95K:TOTAL 75","06_DKC6648SC:95K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130K:HIGH 125","07_DKC7236SC:130K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130K:FLOWERING 75","08_DKC7236SC:130K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130K:TOTAL 75","09_DKC7236SC:130K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95K:HIGH 125","10_DKC7236SC:95K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95K:FLOWERING 75","11_DKC7236SC:95K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95K:TOTAL 75","12_DKC7236SC:95K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130K:HIGH 125","13_DKC6761:130K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130K:FLOWERING 75","14_DKC6761:130K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130K:TOTAL 75","15_DKC6761:130K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95K:HIGH 125","16_DKC6761:95K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95K:FLOWERING 75","17_DKC6761:95K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95K:TOTAL 75","18_DKC6761:95K:TOTAL 75",hybrid__Target_density)))))))))))))))))))



#print(plot_lsmeans)

#write_csv(lsmeans,paste(trial_id, "Grain_dry_yield_statistical_means.csv",sep="_"))





```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=15}
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_1,aes(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot,value, fill=fertilization))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_fertilization")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: CIRE 09-17-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 0.1, group = hybrid__interrow_cm_plot), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+facet_grid(~hybrid__density, scales="free_x")
print(plot_lsmeans)

```

## Statistical analysis of NDRE - Excluding replicate 1

### Index: NDRE 09-17-2025

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=14}
ssc_data_no_1 = filter(ssc_data, !replicate %in% c("1"))

ssc_data_1 = filter(ssc_data_no_1,type=="Index: NDRE 09-17-2025")

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% mutate(hybrid_name = ifelse(HYBRID =="EX6658-95","EX6658",ifelse(HYBRID =="EW6846-95","EW6846",HYBRID)))

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% separate(HYBRIDS, into=c("hybrid_name","plant_density"),sep="_",remove=F)

library(agricolae)
model<-with(ssc_data_1,ssp.plot(replicate,HYBRIDS,plant_density,TREATMENTS,value ))
gla<-model$gl.a; glb<-model$gl.b; glc<-model$gl.c
Ea<-model$Ea; Eb<-model$Eb; Ec<-model$Ec
op<-par(mfrow=c(1,3),cex=0.6)
out1<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,HYBRIDS,gla,Ea,console=TRUE))
out2<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,plant_density,glb,Eb,console=TRUE))
out3<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,TREATMENTS,glc,Ec,console=TRUE))
#plot(out1,xlab="hybrid_name",las=1,variation="IQR")
#plot(out2,xlab="plant_density",variation="IQR")
#plot(out3,xlab="Fertilization_level",variation="IQR")
attach(ssc_data_1)

LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = HYBRIDS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: NDRE 09-17-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = plant_density,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("plant_density")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: NDRE 09-17-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = TREATMENTS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("TREATMENTS")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: NDRE 09-17-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)

# Interaction (varieties:fertilizer)
LSD_ABC = LSD.test(y = value,
                  trt = as.factor(HYBRIDS):as.factor(plant_density):as.factor(TREATMENTS),
                  DFerror = model$gl.c,
                  MSerror = model$Ec,
                  alpha = 0.1,
                  p.adj = "BH",
                  group = TRUE,
                  console = TRUE)




lsmeans = LSD_ABC$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_ABC)
groups = LSD_ABC$groups
groups$hybrid__Target_density = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)



lsmeans = lsmeans %>% separate(hybrid__Target_density, into=c("hybrid","density","fertilization"),sep=":",remove=F)

#lsmeans = lsmeans %>% mutate(stress = ifelse(Irrigation_percent =="100","NS","S"))

lsmeans = lsmeans %>% unite(hybrid__density,hybrid,density, sep="_",remove=F)

lsmeans = lsmeans %>% group_by(hybrid__Target_density) %>% mutate(rank=row_number()) %>% filter(rank==1)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid__Target_density,-value),value, fill=fertilization))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_fertilization")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: NDRE 09-17-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 0.1, group = hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(hybrid__Target_density,value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_fertilization")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: NDRE 09-17-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 0.1, group = hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

lsmeans_1 = lsmeans %>% mutate(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot = ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130K:HIGH 125","01_DKC6648SC:130K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130K:FLOWERING 75","02_DKC6648SC:130K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130K:TOTAL 75","03_DKC6648SC:130K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95K:HIGH 125","04_DKC6648SC:95K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95K:FLOWERING 75","05_DKC6648SC:95K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95K:TOTAL 75","06_DKC6648SC:95K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130K:HIGH 125","07_DKC7236SC:130K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130K:FLOWERING 75","08_DKC7236SC:130K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130K:TOTAL 75","09_DKC7236SC:130K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95K:HIGH 125","10_DKC7236SC:95K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95K:FLOWERING 75","11_DKC7236SC:95K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95K:TOTAL 75","12_DKC7236SC:95K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130K:HIGH 125","13_DKC6761:130K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130K:FLOWERING 75","14_DKC6761:130K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130K:TOTAL 75","15_DKC6761:130K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95K:HIGH 125","16_DKC6761:95K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95K:FLOWERING 75","17_DKC6761:95K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95K:TOTAL 75","18_DKC6761:95K:TOTAL 75",hybrid__Target_density)))))))))))))))))))



#print(plot_lsmeans)

#write_csv(lsmeans,paste(trial_id, "Grain_dry_yield_statistical_means.csv",sep="_"))





```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=15}
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_1,aes(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot,value, fill=fertilization))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_fertilization")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: NDRE 09-17-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 0.1, group = hybrid__interrow_cm_plot), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+facet_grid(~hybrid__density, scales="free_x")
print(plot_lsmeans)

```

### Index: NDRE 07-09-2025

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=14}
ssc_data_no_1 = filter(ssc_data, !replicate %in% c("1"))

ssc_data_1 = filter(ssc_data_no_1,type=="Index: NDRE 07-09-2025")

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% mutate(hybrid_name = ifelse(HYBRID =="EX6658-95","EX6658",ifelse(HYBRID =="EW6846-95","EW6846",HYBRID)))

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% separate(HYBRIDS, into=c("hybrid_name","plant_density"),sep="_",remove=F)

library(agricolae)
model<-with(ssc_data_1,ssp.plot(replicate,HYBRIDS,plant_density,TREATMENTS,value ))
gla<-model$gl.a; glb<-model$gl.b; glc<-model$gl.c
Ea<-model$Ea; Eb<-model$Eb; Ec<-model$Ec
op<-par(mfrow=c(1,3),cex=0.6)
out1<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,HYBRIDS,gla,Ea,console=TRUE))
out2<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,plant_density,glb,Eb,console=TRUE))
out3<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,TREATMENTS,glc,Ec,console=TRUE))
#plot(out1,xlab="hybrid_name",las=1,variation="IQR")
#plot(out2,xlab="plant_density",variation="IQR")
#plot(out3,xlab="Fertilization_level",variation="IQR")
attach(ssc_data_1)

LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = HYBRIDS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: NDRE 07-09-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = plant_density,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("plant_density")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: NDRE 07-09-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = TREATMENTS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("TREATMENTS")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: NDRE 07-09-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)

# Interaction (varieties:fertilizer)
LSD_ABC = LSD.test(y = value,
                  trt = as.factor(HYBRIDS):as.factor(plant_density):as.factor(TREATMENTS),
                  DFerror = model$gl.c,
                  MSerror = model$Ec,
                  alpha = 0.1,
                  p.adj = "BH",
                  group = TRUE,
                  console = TRUE)




lsmeans = LSD_ABC$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_ABC)
groups = LSD_ABC$groups
groups$hybrid__Target_density = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)



lsmeans = lsmeans %>% separate(hybrid__Target_density, into=c("hybrid","density","fertilization"),sep=":",remove=F)

#lsmeans = lsmeans %>% mutate(stress = ifelse(Irrigation_percent =="100","NS","S"))

lsmeans = lsmeans %>% unite(hybrid__density,hybrid,density, sep="_",remove=F)

lsmeans = lsmeans %>% group_by(hybrid__Target_density) %>% mutate(rank=row_number()) %>% filter(rank==1)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid__Target_density,-value),value, fill=fertilization))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_fertilization")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: NDRE 07-09-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 0.1, group = hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(hybrid__Target_density,value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_fertilization")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: NDRE 07-09-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 0.1, group = hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

lsmeans_1 = lsmeans %>% mutate(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot = ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130K:HIGH 125","01_DKC6648SC:130K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130K:FLOWERING 75","02_DKC6648SC:130K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130K:TOTAL 75","03_DKC6648SC:130K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95K:HIGH 125","04_DKC6648SC:95K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95K:FLOWERING 75","05_DKC6648SC:95K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95K:TOTAL 75","06_DKC6648SC:95K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130K:HIGH 125","07_DKC7236SC:130K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130K:FLOWERING 75","08_DKC7236SC:130K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130K:TOTAL 75","09_DKC7236SC:130K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95K:HIGH 125","10_DKC7236SC:95K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95K:FLOWERING 75","11_DKC7236SC:95K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95K:TOTAL 75","12_DKC7236SC:95K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130K:HIGH 125","13_DKC6761:130K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130K:FLOWERING 75","14_DKC6761:130K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130K:TOTAL 75","15_DKC6761:130K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95K:HIGH 125","16_DKC6761:95K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95K:FLOWERING 75","17_DKC6761:95K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95K:TOTAL 75","18_DKC6761:95K:TOTAL 75",hybrid__Target_density)))))))))))))))))))



#print(plot_lsmeans)

#write_csv(lsmeans,paste(trial_id, "Grain_dry_yield_statistical_means.csv",sep="_"))





```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=15}
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_1,aes(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot,value, fill=fertilization))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_fertilization")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: NDRE 07-09-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 0.1, group = hybrid__interrow_cm_plot), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+facet_grid(~hybrid__density, scales="free_x")
print(plot_lsmeans)

```

## Statistical analysis of GNDVI - Excluding replicate 1

### Index: GNDVI 07-09-2025

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=14}
ssc_data_no_1 = filter(ssc_data, !replicate %in% c("1"))

ssc_data_1 = filter(ssc_data_no_1,type=="Index: GNDVI 07-09-2025")

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% mutate(hybrid_name = ifelse(HYBRID =="EX6658-95","EX6658",ifelse(HYBRID =="EW6846-95","EW6846",HYBRID)))

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% separate(HYBRIDS, into=c("hybrid_name","plant_density"),sep="_",remove=F)

library(agricolae)
model<-with(ssc_data_1,ssp.plot(replicate,HYBRIDS,plant_density,TREATMENTS,value ))
gla<-model$gl.a; glb<-model$gl.b; glc<-model$gl.c
Ea<-model$Ea; Eb<-model$Eb; Ec<-model$Ec
op<-par(mfrow=c(1,3),cex=0.6)
out1<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,HYBRIDS,gla,Ea,console=TRUE))
out2<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,plant_density,glb,Eb,console=TRUE))
out3<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,TREATMENTS,glc,Ec,console=TRUE))
#plot(out1,xlab="hybrid_name",las=1,variation="IQR")
#plot(out2,xlab="plant_density",variation="IQR")
#plot(out3,xlab="Fertilization_level",variation="IQR")
attach(ssc_data_1)

LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = HYBRIDS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: GNDVI 07-09-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = plant_density,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("plant_density")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: GNDVI 07-09-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = TREATMENTS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("TREATMENTS")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: GNDVI 07-09-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)

# Interaction (varieties:fertilizer)
LSD_ABC = LSD.test(y = value,
                  trt = as.factor(HYBRIDS):as.factor(plant_density):as.factor(TREATMENTS),
                  DFerror = model$gl.c,
                  MSerror = model$Ec,
                  alpha = 0.1,
                  p.adj = "BH",
                  group = TRUE,
                  console = TRUE)




lsmeans = LSD_ABC$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_ABC)
groups = LSD_ABC$groups
groups$hybrid__Target_density = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)



lsmeans = lsmeans %>% separate(hybrid__Target_density, into=c("hybrid","density","fertilization"),sep=":",remove=F)

#lsmeans = lsmeans %>% mutate(stress = ifelse(Irrigation_percent =="100","NS","S"))

lsmeans = lsmeans %>% unite(hybrid__density,hybrid,density, sep="_",remove=F)

lsmeans = lsmeans %>% group_by(hybrid__Target_density) %>% mutate(rank=row_number()) %>% filter(rank==1)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid__Target_density,-value),value, fill=fertilization))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_fertilization")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: GNDVI 07-09-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 0.1, group = hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(hybrid__Target_density,value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_fertilization")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: GNDVI 07-09-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 0.1, group = hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

lsmeans_1 = lsmeans %>% mutate(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot = ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130K:HIGH 125","01_DKC6648SC:130K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130K:FLOWERING 75","02_DKC6648SC:130K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130K:TOTAL 75","03_DKC6648SC:130K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95K:HIGH 125","04_DKC6648SC:95K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95K:FLOWERING 75","05_DKC6648SC:95K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95K:TOTAL 75","06_DKC6648SC:95K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130K:HIGH 125","07_DKC7236SC:130K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130K:FLOWERING 75","08_DKC7236SC:130K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130K:TOTAL 75","09_DKC7236SC:130K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95K:HIGH 125","10_DKC7236SC:95K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95K:FLOWERING 75","11_DKC7236SC:95K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95K:TOTAL 75","12_DKC7236SC:95K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130K:HIGH 125","13_DKC6761:130K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130K:FLOWERING 75","14_DKC6761:130K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130K:TOTAL 75","15_DKC6761:130K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95K:HIGH 125","16_DKC6761:95K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95K:FLOWERING 75","17_DKC6761:95K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95K:TOTAL 75","18_DKC6761:95K:TOTAL 75",hybrid__Target_density)))))))))))))))))))



#print(plot_lsmeans)

#write_csv(lsmeans,paste(trial_id, "Grain_dry_yield_statistical_means.csv",sep="_"))





```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=15}
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_1,aes(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot,value, fill=fertilization))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_fertilization")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: GNDVI 07-09-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 0.1, group = hybrid__interrow_cm_plot), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+facet_grid(~hybrid__density, scales="free_x")
print(plot_lsmeans)

```

### Index: GNDVI 09-17-2025

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=14}
ssc_data_no_1 = filter(ssc_data, !replicate %in% c("1"))

ssc_data_1 = filter(ssc_data_no_1,type=="Index: GNDVI 09-17-2025")

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% mutate(hybrid_name = ifelse(HYBRID =="EX6658-95","EX6658",ifelse(HYBRID =="EW6846-95","EW6846",HYBRID)))

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% separate(HYBRIDS, into=c("hybrid_name","plant_density"),sep="_",remove=F)

library(agricolae)
model<-with(ssc_data_1,ssp.plot(replicate,HYBRIDS,plant_density,TREATMENTS,value ))
gla<-model$gl.a; glb<-model$gl.b; glc<-model$gl.c
Ea<-model$Ea; Eb<-model$Eb; Ec<-model$Ec
op<-par(mfrow=c(1,3),cex=0.6)
out1<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,HYBRIDS,gla,Ea,console=TRUE))
out2<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,plant_density,glb,Eb,console=TRUE))
out3<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,TREATMENTS,glc,Ec,console=TRUE))
#plot(out1,xlab="hybrid_name",las=1,variation="IQR")
#plot(out2,xlab="plant_density",variation="IQR")
#plot(out3,xlab="Fertilization_level",variation="IQR")
attach(ssc_data_1)

LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = HYBRIDS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: GNDVI 09-17-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = plant_density,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("plant_density")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: GNDVI 09-17-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = TREATMENTS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("TREATMENTS")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: GNDVI 09-17-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)

# Interaction (varieties:fertilizer)
LSD_ABC = LSD.test(y = value,
                  trt = as.factor(HYBRIDS):as.factor(plant_density):as.factor(TREATMENTS),
                  DFerror = model$gl.c,
                  MSerror = model$Ec,
                  alpha = 0.1,
                  p.adj = "BH",
                  group = TRUE,
                  console = TRUE)




lsmeans = LSD_ABC$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_ABC)
groups = LSD_ABC$groups
groups$hybrid__Target_density = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)



lsmeans = lsmeans %>% separate(hybrid__Target_density, into=c("hybrid","density","fertilization"),sep=":",remove=F)

#lsmeans = lsmeans %>% mutate(stress = ifelse(Irrigation_percent =="100","NS","S"))

lsmeans = lsmeans %>% unite(hybrid__density,hybrid,density, sep="_",remove=F)

lsmeans = lsmeans %>% group_by(hybrid__Target_density) %>% mutate(rank=row_number()) %>% filter(rank==1)


plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid__Target_density,-value),value, fill=fertilization))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_fertilization")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: GNDVI 09-17-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 0.1, group = hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(hybrid__Target_density,value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_fertilization")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: GNDVI 09-17-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 0.1, group = hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

lsmeans_1 = lsmeans %>% mutate(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot = ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130K:HIGH 125","01_DKC6648SC:130K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130K:FLOWERING 75","02_DKC6648SC:130K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130K:TOTAL 75","03_DKC6648SC:130K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95K:HIGH 125","04_DKC6648SC:95K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95K:FLOWERING 75","05_DKC6648SC:95K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95K:TOTAL 75","06_DKC6648SC:95K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130K:HIGH 125","07_DKC7236SC:130K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130K:FLOWERING 75","08_DKC7236SC:130K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130K:TOTAL 75","09_DKC7236SC:130K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95K:HIGH 125","10_DKC7236SC:95K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95K:FLOWERING 75","11_DKC7236SC:95K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95K:TOTAL 75","12_DKC7236SC:95K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130K:HIGH 125","13_DKC6761:130K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130K:FLOWERING 75","14_DKC6761:130K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130K:TOTAL 75","15_DKC6761:130K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95K:HIGH 125","16_DKC6761:95K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95K:FLOWERING 75","17_DKC6761:95K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95K:TOTAL 75","18_DKC6761:95K:TOTAL 75",hybrid__Target_density)))))))))))))))))))



#print(plot_lsmeans)

#write_csv(lsmeans,paste(trial_id, "Grain_dry_yield_statistical_means.csv",sep="_"))





```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=15}
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_1,aes(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot,value, fill=fertilization))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_fertilization")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: GNDVI 09-17-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 0.1, group = hybrid__interrow_cm_plot), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+facet_grid(~hybrid__density, scales="free_x")
print(plot_lsmeans)

```

## Statistical analysis of yield - Excluding replicate 1 & 2

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=14}
ssc_data_no_1 = filter(ssc_data, !replicate %in% c("1","2"))

ssc_data_1 = filter(ssc_data_no_1,type=="dry_yield_t_ha")

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% mutate(hybrid_name = ifelse(HYBRID =="EX6658-95","EX6658",ifelse(HYBRID =="EW6846-95","EW6846",HYBRID)))

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% separate(HYBRIDS, into=c("hybrid_name","plant_density"),sep="_",remove=F)

library(agricolae)
model<-with(ssc_data_1,ssp.plot(replicate,HYBRIDS,plant_density,TREATMENTS,value ))
gla<-model$gl.a; glb<-model$gl.b; glc<-model$gl.c
Ea<-model$Ea; Eb<-model$Eb; Ec<-model$Ec
op<-par(mfrow=c(1,3),cex=0.6)
out1<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,HYBRIDS,gla,Ea,console=TRUE))
out2<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,plant_density,glb,Eb,console=TRUE))
out3<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,TREATMENTS,glc,Ec,console=TRUE))
plot(out1,xlab="hybrid_name",las=1,variation="IQR")
plot(out2,xlab="plant_density",variation="IQR")
plot(out3,xlab="Fertilization_level",variation="IQR")
attach(ssc_data_1)

LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = HYBRIDS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield, t/ha)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = plant_density,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("plant_density")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield, t/ha)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = TREATMENTS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("TREATMENTS")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield, t/ha)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)

# Interaction (varieties:fertilizer)
LSD_ABC = LSD.test(y = value,
                  trt = as.factor(HYBRIDS):as.factor(plant_density):as.factor(TREATMENTS),
                  DFerror = model$gl.c,
                  MSerror = model$Ec,
                  alpha = 0.1,
                  p.adj = "BH",
                  group = TRUE,
                  console = TRUE)




lsmeans = LSD_ABC$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_ABC)
groups = LSD_ABC$groups
groups$hybrid__Target_density = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)



lsmeans = lsmeans %>% separate(hybrid__Target_density, into=c("hybrid","density","fertilization"),sep=":",remove=F)

#lsmeans = lsmeans %>% mutate(stress = ifelse(Irrigation_percent =="100","NS","S"))

lsmeans = lsmeans %>% unite(hybrid__density,hybrid,density, sep="_",remove=F)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid__Target_density,-value),value, fill=fertilization))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_fertilization")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield, t/ha)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 5, group = hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(hybrid__Target_density,value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_fertilization")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield, t/ha)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 5, group = hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

lsmeans_1 = lsmeans %>% mutate(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot = ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130K:HIGH 125","01_DKC6648SC:130K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130K:FLOWERING 75","02_DKC6648SC:130K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130K:TOTAL 75","03_DKC6648SC:130K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95K:HIGH 125","04_DKC6648SC:95K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95K:FLOWERING 75","05_DKC6648SC:95K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95K:TOTAL 75","06_DKC6648SC:95K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130K:HIGH 125","07_DKC7236SC:130K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130K:FLOWERING 75","08_DKC7236SC:130K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130K:TOTAL 75","09_DKC7236SC:130K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95K:HIGH 125","10_DKC7236SC:95K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95K:FLOWERING 75","11_DKC7236SC:95K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95K:TOTAL 75","12_DKC7236SC:95K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130K:HIGH 125","13_DKC6761:130K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130K:FLOWERING 75","14_DKC6761:130K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130K:TOTAL 75","15_DKC6761:130K:TOTAL 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95K:HIGH 125","16_DKC6761:95K:HIGH 125",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95K:FLOWERING 75","17_DKC6761:95K:FLOWERING 75",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95K:TOTAL 75","18_DKC6761:95K:TOTAL 75",hybrid__Target_density)))))))))))))))))))



#print(plot_lsmeans)

#write_csv(lsmeans,paste(trial_id, "Grain_dry_yield_statistical_means.csv",sep="_"))





```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=15}
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_1,aes(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot,value, fill=fertilization))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_fertilization")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield, t/ha)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 2, group = hybrid__interrow_cm_plot), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+facet_grid(~hybrid__density, scales="free_x")
print(plot_lsmeans)

```



## Statistical analysis of yield - Excluding replicate 3 & 4

### In a low yielding sub-field

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=14}
ssc_data_no_1 = filter(ssc_data, !replicate %in% c("3","4"))

ssc_data_1 = filter(ssc_data_no_1,type=="dry_yield_t_ha")

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% mutate(hybrid_name = ifelse(HYBRID =="EX6658-95","EX6658",ifelse(HYBRID =="EW6846-95","EW6846",HYBRID)))

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% separate(HYBRIDS, into=c("hybrid_name","plant_density"),sep="_",remove=F)

library(agricolae)
model<-with(ssc_data_1,ssp.plot(replicate,HYBRIDS,plant_density,TREATMENTS,value ))
gla<-model$gl.a; glb<-model$gl.b; glc<-model$gl.c
Ea<-model$Ea; Eb<-model$Eb; Ec<-model$Ec
op<-par(mfrow=c(1,3),cex=0.6)
out1<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,HYBRIDS,gla,Ea,console=TRUE))
out2<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,plant_density,glb,Eb,console=TRUE))
out3<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,TREATMENTS,glc,Ec,console=TRUE))
plot(out1,xlab="hybrid_name",las=1,variation="IQR")
plot(out2,xlab="plant_density",variation="IQR")
plot(out3,xlab="Fertilization_level",variation="IQR")
attach(ssc_data_1)

LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = HYBRIDS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield, t/ha)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
```
